title: 𝐂𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐧 𝐒𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐞
description:
ɪᴛs ᴏɴʟʏ ғᴏʀ ᴛʜᴇ ʙᴇᴛᴛᴇʀ ɪғ ɪᴍ ᴛʀʏɪɴɢ ᴛᴏ ᴄʜᴀɴɢᴇ ʏᴏᴜ - ᴘᴏʟᴏ ɢ

In New York City,  21 years old Diamond Hughes faces the ongoing challenges of being a single mom after getting pregnant and having falling out with her ex boyfriend her senior year in highschool.


After a few years,  Xavier James aka former UCLA college football star and baby daddy returns into her life wanting a second chance to make things right. 


Stuck between the past and present, Diamond built up her walls refusing to allow Xavier back into her life because of past hurt and trust issues she had been holding onto the past few years.

title: Hell Is Just Love In Disguise
description:
Behind the perfect facade of Tiger Delmonico lies a tangled web of secrets and lies...

17 year old Raleigh Fox has nothing to lose. With her parents dead and her uncle missing all she can focus on is graduating from high school. 

When she inherits her father's fortune it should be enough to get her by, until she can find some proper footing. But then she meets Tiger Delmonico who seems just too perfect. He takes her into his world and sweeps her off her feet. 

Then everything starts falling apart and nothing is as it seems. 

Falling in love has never been more dangerous...because love lies.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi! 💙 I'm Ouanessa Nana, an aspiring writer who loves creating stories about fantasy, romance, and the chance to create a juicy dramatic scene. 💔

As a Creative Writing Grad Student, I write short stories whenever I can. If I'm not writing, I'm thinking about writing. 💖

Right now I am working on A Boyfriend? How About No, Hell Is Just Love In Disguise, Steal My Soul, Boys Are Liars, The Rule, and Off The Wall. 💜🌈

I like writing more than one story at once but if you remind me to update on your favorite one I will do it as quickly as I can.

THANK YOU for checking out my profile and I hope you decide to read one of my stories. ☺️💓

title: How to Date an Asshole
description:
Like most people, Lauren had a big crush on a celebrity when she was a teenager. 

Unlike most people, she met hers ten years later, learned how big of a jerk he was, loathed him, and wanted nothing to do with him anymore.

The problem was when she started her new job, there was an initiation: ask out the next guy who'll enter the room. 
The rules are as follows:
•	If he is married, ask the next one.
•	If he is in a relationship, one coffee date. Maximum twenty minutes.
•	If he is single, five dates.
•	And last, but most important, he must be willing to go on a date with you.

Little did she know that Axel James, her teenage celebrity crush, would be the one who'll walk in next. And he is absolutely willing.


----------------------------

Category: Fake Dating x Enemies to Lovers
Word count: 150,000 - 160,000 words

Highest ranking:
#1 Romantic Comedy, Contemporary Romance, Adult, Actor, Accountant, New York City
#2 New Adult
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Alanis Korali is a real-life Accountant sans the hot celebrity boyfriend (TBD). She is a self-proclaimed hopeless romantic as evidenced by her writing.

Her debut novel 'How to Date an Asshole' was inspired by her high school teacher who told her that no one can write about an experience they've never had or about a place they've never been to.
150,000 words later and you could say she can go above and beyond just to prove people wrong.

After reading and writing, her other passions include baking, photography, Formula 1, cats, and guitar playing.

Alanis loves to hear from her readers, feel free to send her a message or email at alanis.korali@outlook.com

title: Karma
description:
Warning!!! Contains mature content
18+


Hell hath no fury like a woman scorned.

Karma is a bitch and Katerina was a bitch, she never forgot the address to deliver her fury.

At eighteen she was married, at twenty one she was divorced. She loved and she was rejected. She swore to do just, she would punish those that took love for granted, she would make those men pay. She would be the executioner of justice to women. She hated men. She developed an secret identity on the dark web known as Karma, where women with vendetta with men could use her services for payback, until one day a woman approached her, aware of her secret dark web identity, and asked her to punish her husband. She had no idea what she had gotten herself into until she was left wondering was this her Karma?

title: Secrets keeper
description:
Gawking two guys in a hot-blown make-out session in the mathematical section of the library was not what I expected my first day after Winter breaks to be like.

And didn't realize that seeing them was about to change my whole high school experience...

Lillian Smith, the shy, quiet, nerdy girl, gets transferred to the most prestigious high school in her town, West Hills High, on a scholarship in her junior year. She spends half of her year hiding from the rich kids at her school to prevent any trouble. But one accidental encounter at the library with the popular bad boy of her high school changes things for her.

One little secret leads to another until Lillian gets stuck with the secrets of the popular group, The Clichés. The burden of the secrets becomes heavy, and Lillian doesn't know what to do with them anymore.

~•~•~•~•~•~

"What's your name?"

"Lillian... Lillian Smith." 

"Okay, Lillian, so this is what going to happen next." He crossed his arms. "I'm going to let you go and you-" he held his finger at me, "- will tell no one about this." I bobbed my head. "And if I hear even a single word uttering from your mouth about us..." He gestured between him and Toby. "I will-"

"- Kill you." I finished for him and give him a thumbs up. "Got it."

"Then it's settled!" Toby announced, clasping his hands and beamed. "It's going to be our little secret."

~•~•~•~•~•~

title: Neon Girl
description:
A musically talented teen with her sights set on the spotlight must find a way to get her life back when she falls in with the mob.
                                                                      *****
In a city where con artists make the rules and aspiring females wear sequins and dance with a pole, Melody Holiday refuses to ride on the coattails of her semi-famous grandfather. She wants the freedom to choose her own path to showbiz greatness. When a chance meeting with a handsome stranger provides Mel with an opportunity, she thinks she's landed the big one. But her grandpa isn't thrilled with the direction Mel's career is going, and it's not until she stumbles across something she probably shouldn't have that this becomes clear. Perhaps meeting the stranger with the Rocky Balboa eyes wasn't by chance. Maybe Mel is rubbing elbows with the kind of people who could take away her freedom for good. 

This story is loosely based on the author's feral youth. So, if you like your fiction shaken not stirred with a sprinkle of badboy on the rim, NEON GIRL delivers the goods; giving readers a dose of drama, a dash of romance, and a heaping helping of Las Vegas schmaltz. Oh, and there's a killer playlist, too.

WATTYS WINNER!

LEGAL DISCLAIMER: This is a work of fiction and owned by the author. If you attempt to plagiarize, the author knows people backstage who can 'take care of things'. IN OTHER WORDS: If you find this story on any online platform other than WATTPAD, the author did not allow this. You may also be exposing yourself to malware. If you wish to read this story in its original, safe form, do it here on WATTPAD.

authorBio:

HELLO wonderful readers. Welcome to my YA profile. If you like fantasy with a side of romance, you have stumbled into the right club.

NEON GIRL: A Watty winner set in fabulous Las Vegas, where fame can happen to anyone and connections come with strings attached. [Also on YONDER]

BLOOMER: A mash-up of magic, dystopia, and the oldest profession on earth. And the mischief continues with TENDERFOOT.

THE DRAGON RIDER AND THE FLYBOY: A steampunk adventure that sets out to prove that dragons and chickens can live peacefully together.

LITTLE WITCHES: Something for lovers of magic, quirky characters, and badass bitches. Or, should that be witches?

The far-sighted SHEEP is there for shi*s and giggles.

For a little fireside reading, I also write adult romance here on WATTPAD under the username @neverfakeit

title: Crack The Job
description:
"We should do it."

"So... You mean?" He looked confused, trying hard to not misunderstand her words.

"Marry me." 

And there he knew by the look in her eyes that she wasn't kidding.

★★★

After getting kicked out of her former job, Payal decides to use her brother-in-law's connection to get a job in a supermarket. Although it seemed simple to work a nine-to-five job with no extra hours and a good sum of money, the job came with a requirement. 

Everyone in the supermarket must be married.  

A ridiculous requirement but what else could she do? The last thing she wanted was to stay back at home and be jobless. With the help of Siddharth, the senior back at college, she is backed up to fulfil the requirement. Taking love as just a second preference, they ride in together on this twisted journey. 

She just needs to get the job, isn't it? Can she keep the game on and crack the job or will the lies finally fall apart?

★★★

#1 in rumour
#2 in supermarket

title: Lost Without You
description:
Book Two of Lost in the Castle Trilogy 
(Book Three is on the WATTYS 2022 SHORTLIST)

THE AMBY AWARDS 2022 WINNER (Best Series)

Samara, separated from Vlad by an unfortunate turn of events, is sent back to her century for her own good and safety. 

Not being able to face the prospect of living the rest of her life without the only man she loves, she refuses to lose hope of going back to him.

But is going back even possible? 

Looking for answers to her endless questions, she discovers that not even in present-day London all the people are what they seem to be at first sight...

Venturing deeper in secrets and mysteries, which suddenly seem to spring at her from London's every shadowy corner, she meets a man who she thought was long dead and the secret society surrounding him. 

Will Samara find her way back to Vlad with the stranger's help? Does he know things that might help her?

Will she find a way to stay with Vlad this time, forever?

The journey to her happiness  won't be short, easy, or simple. 

Samara will have to make a difficult choice. If she wants to try to gain back the man she loves, she will have to risk all that she has. 

Will she be able to leave one of her most precious beings behind to recover the other? 

Cover: @WakeWriteWrath

title: The Return of the Bad boy
description:
*Featured on Wattpad Teen fiction* 

For the record, Cameron "Cam" St. James got arrested for a dumb prank. Off the record, it was far from a joke. It was personal. 

When word gets out that Cam has gotten into trouble with the beloved mayor, his reputation takes a hit. He goes from the town's golden boy to public enemy number one. All the overwhelming amount of hate becomes a good excuse to make a getaway for the summer. But Cam can't stay away forever, not when he's left so many unanswered questions. All of which his ex-girlfriend Summer Bennet is dying to figure out. 

Summer can't wait to put her investigative skills to the test. Her small blog can finally be useful for something other than meager town updates. Summer wants the truth behind why the elusive bad boy risked it all and, most importantly, why Cam is suddenly adamant about staying away from her. But Cam's secrets are part of an elaborate web, and Summer could easily get tangled up.

So as Summer inches closer to the truth, she puts Cam in a tight spot. Everyone believes Cam's actions were unprovoked, but the real story is one for the headlines. Cam might have been hell-bent on seeking justice, but it's his word against the most powerful man in town. Cam might have a fiery blogger on his side who doesn't know when to back down, but what if it isn't enough?

title: Crushin' on Him (YA Romance)
description:
Jasmine tries to get the attention of her longtime crush and popular football player Desmond, while outside forces try to stand in her way.
----
Jasmine "Jazz" Mills is starting her senior year of high school. Nothing great has happened over the years. The only thing keeping her excited about school was her crush Dezmond "Dez" Graham.

He's a star football player and too popular for her. That is until the night of his party, where she invades his bedroom and his personal space. Sparks fly instantly, causing the two to begin a whirlwind love affair.

The only problems are other people, and outside forces, trying to come between the two of them.

Jasmine and Dezmond must prove their love is worth fighting for no matter what.

That's easier said than done when you have an ex-girlfriend, ex-boyfriend and a controlling father in the picture.

authorBio:

***

Hello, Ladies and Gentleman. I'm an avid reader and writer. I love to read and write. I have a special place in my heart for Romance, Paranormal, Fantasy, Historical, and Thriller stories.

I mostly write romance. I'm a hopeless romantic. *sigh*. I write YA (young adult) and I write for my adult readers (mature audience). I dabble in erotic stories, too.

Feel free to leave any constructive criticism you have about my stories. I welcome it, and I'm always looking to better myself at writing.

Please don't ask me to read your story or help promote it. I apologize. I just don't have the time to do so.

Completed: Give in to Me, Crushin' on Him, Nina's Second Chance at Romance, A Second Chance at Love, Training for Love, The Art of Love, and Searching for May.

title: 𝔹 𝕃 𝔸 ℂ 𝕂  ℍ 𝕆 𝕎
description:
Black folks aren't a monolith. Black is a culture with subcultures. Black is rich, Black is poor... Black is peace, Black is war... Black evolves, Black creates... Black wasn't forced on us, we created Black by combining scraps of traditions lost to us with a twist on the Eurocentric wasteland we were stolen to. If Black ain't powerful? If Black ain't Black?!

i got something for all of us.

An anthology of thought.

title: HERMANASTRO
description:
HERMANASTRO

Spanish for "stepbrother"
 
*************
Rissa is a simple girl, who lives with her single mother. They had a simple life, not until Rissa's father requested for her to come stay with him for four months.

She agrees and moves over to her dad's, there she meets her step mother and step brother, Jace. She doesn't get along with her father, instead she acts rebellious towards her father just like her step brother Jace. 

During the course of her stay in the house, Jace starts developing feelings for Rissa. He knows it's wrong but still tries to woo his sister. 

Rissa however becomes confused when she finds out she might have feelings for her brother too.

They're both stuck in a forbidden relationship, they can't break up and they can't be with each other.

title: Whiskey Latte
description:
Millennial immigrant Ingrid has quasi-settled in Berlin. She's got a place of her own, the beginning of a career and 'a conscience but not a heart,' according to her barkeep best friend with benefits, Remi. 

Dale is an awkward exchange student, abroad for the first time and powerless to resist Ingrid's charms when a mutual friend introduces them. He gets tangled up with her at the same time as his newfound mentor Oskar confronts Ingrid about the heartbreak she caused him way back when. 

Trapped between her conscience and her urge to sink her teeth into fresh prey, Ingrid must make a choice. Give the wishful-thinking fool what he wants and tear him to pieces, or let him go and hope for the best?

title: Timeless
description:
Have you ever wondered how life was being the big girl in class? Jazmine has. During middle school she was constantly bullied, even by the one person who she thought was always going to be by her side and stick with her through thick and thin. The separation of her parents forced her to move away to Chicago, where the majority of her family lives.

While living in Chicago, she became a stonger individual and her self esteem rose. She worked hard to become who she is today as a senior in high school. The majority of her support came from her father who suddenly passed away. The sudden death of him had Jazmine curious, even though she had to go back home to New York it didn't stop her from pursuing the life her father lived.

title: Falling
description:
Bailey Smith, a straight-A student, doesn't have time for fun. Until she takes a summer internship at Bay Turf Resort, where she meets bad boy Jayden Lemmy. He's not the type of person so she can bring home to her father, so she knows she should stay away from him, but his beguiling grin and risky ways are too alluring.

Despite his lack of formal education, Jayden Lemmy sees Bailey as someone who is ambitious, motivated, and dedicated, much as he was before the accident that changed his life forever. He pledges to stay away from her, but when a co-worker forces him into a bet he can't reject, he's forced to face his demons.

It is not long before Bailey and Jayden are into each other. The flames they spark are wild and devouring, but as terrible secrets are revealed, can he prove himself worthy of the girl who can heal his broken heart, or will it all go out of control?

title: a crescendo of flame & melody (bloodraven)
description:
Nerissa closes the gap between them, venom on her tongue as she slowly articulates her words, her body rejecting the taste like poison. Each syllable shatters Elizabeth's fragile barrier, glass piercing through flesh: "Then do it. Kill me, Elizabeth. Let this end by your hand. No one else's."

Elizabeth freezes, her pulsing heart beating faster once more as the truth behind Nerissa's challenge becomes apparent and irrefutable. Her thoughts begin to intertwine as if they morphed into stubborn wires, tangling into an incoherent mess. Static crackles in her ears as Nerissa's voice turns velvety - soft, almost tender. "Isn't that what you want? To be the one to put an end to the accidental chaos I'd caused, to claim the final act as your own?"

title: Sober
description:
Asher Reynolds is fed up of receiving five consecutive  heart breaks from his girlfriends who he thought loved him dearly with all their hearts but ended up shattering his heart over and over again. He finds it surprising because he has a brother in Hollywood who has girls chasing him all over the world and he who gets few, end up breaking his heart into pieces.  He concludes all girls are the same and vows not to date any girl again after his fifth girlfriend, Kylie, breaks his heart.

°~•~•°

But is that really true? Especially when good girl Tiffany with excellent grades comes his way and he is attracted to her but is afraid to approach because she has a boyfriend and he may get another heart break! Find out what happens!

title: The song of us
description:

1st October, Nigeria's Independence day. She turns 60.

Instead of writing the usual Independence story about colonial rule and fight for freedom. I decided to do something different.

This book contains four different chapters of different stories that gives a glimpse into the typical life of an average Nigerian.

It's short, a little witty and averagely relatable. Non-Nigerians are welcome as well.

Don't worry. It's a quick read.

authorBio:
━━━━━♔━━━━━━━━━♔━
I try to follow back. Not very successful most of the time but I try I promise.

I'm Denise Williams (Actually,  my pen name. Only weird people know my real name.) And I am a Christian, opinionated, female writer.

Everything I write is the exact opposite of who I am. I've actually never felt the touch of a man romantically and I can't even order more ketchup without giving myself a pep talk. When I'm not creating imagined worlds, I am usually reading or having a race with my pet turtle.

If you ever need anything or someone to talk to, I encourage you to send a private message or leave a comment on Message Board.

Okay, I'm done. You can leave now.

title: Kiss My Scars [Wattpad Version]
description:
Tasheena Hinton has a secret that no one knows. Focused on graduating, going to college, and her first relationship, there is one thing missing in her life and that's not knowing who her father is. Can an early graduation gift from her younger sister help solve this puzzle for Tasheena so that she can finally begin to heal from the suffering of years of abuse and neglect? 

Terrence Dunn is enjoying his senior year as a star basketball player at his high school. He has an incredible girlfriend and is committed to play basketball at Kansas State University. Everything in his life seems perfect until he learns a dark secret about his best friend and neighbor, Tasheena Hinton. 

Terrence decides to help Tasheena by embarking on a summer road trip after graduation to help her find answers in hopes that it will also help her begin to heal. On this trip, as he learns more about her he finds himself looking at her in a way that he never has before despite that she is already in a relationship with his teammate and friend, Qasim "Q" Matthews.

Tasheena finds herself torn between the two friends.
With everything she has been through will she finally find some peace? Most importantly will she allow anyone to get close enough to kiss her scars?

title: Ryder - BOOK 2
description:
"......I want her against that shower wall, with only my body weight pinning her up. This woman is mine, and I'll make her to feel like it at a base level...." 

___________

A part of Ryder's past is now haunting him in cold, calculated ways. He could weather it on his own, as he's used to the pressure. But what about when it starts going after his love interest and sports therapist, Julie? She's still fighting for her brother's legacy, after all. 

The two had never envisioned entering any kind of relationship when they first met, but here they are, in the same bed after a wild, intimate night. 

And now the coach knows. And the shadow from Ryder's past begins to attack Julie, directly...and it will either break her, or bring them closer. 

There can be no salvation without wreckage, although sometimes, the destruction is too great to repair what's been broken. Will Ryder's heart be able to handle the wreckage coming his way when his past takes the deepest punch they can throw? Or will Julie be the salvation that he needs? 

...

DUAL POV romance with majority in female lead's perspective

BOOK 2 of the W A R L O R D series: a steamy, MMA romance with a crass, brooding male lead that loves fiercely once his walls are down. **This is a sequel that follows the direct storyline of the first, so it's recommended to read Book 1 before this one**

title: Beautiful Dilemma
description:
She was beauty; deep and rich in art...
He was an enigma; an inexplicable force of nature...

          Akilah Johnson, was an art student at Cambridge School of Arts. With her dream of becoming a famous muralist, she is more than ready for the start of her senior year. 

          As a heavily awarded fighter in one of the deadliest forms of mixed martial arts, Jevon Williams was more than ready to prove his worth in the real world.  

          But their lives take a dramatic turn for the worse when Jevon is forced to attend Cambridge.  His dream is to become a professional fighter, maybe even become an olympian. Some art school is definitely not going to get him noticed by the right people. In many failed attempts at getting kicked out of the school, Jevon's future and hopes of becoming a professional fighter are called into question. 

          His only hope at redemption lies within Akilah; a girl he barely knows, yet seems to take over his life completely. 

          She has one goal in mind, and that's to get the hell out of dodge. She can't wait to be on her own, completely free. She craves independence and she is damn sure going to get it. But she never thought that the road to getting there would include Jevon; a boy she barely knows, yet somehow seems to captivate her unwillingly.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
The stories in my head could write a beautiful symphony. You won't regret tuning in. (At least I hope not lol)

Tips:
1. You can read my books by the cover if you want, but I'd prefer if you started with the summary.

2. Feedback is appreciated, but not always accepted. Show me love, and I'll give it right back.

3. Above all, dive into the words on the screen. Use your imagination when you read--go wild with it, and the picture will paint itself.💋

title: You Must Remember This
description:
A misguidedly idealistic high school student founds a club to teach his classmates philosophy; when it becomes a cult, he must change course before the whole school drinks the Kool-Aid.

Frank can think of no better way to prove his classmates have no moral compass than to write a manifesto satirically arguing for the virtues of selfishness; when this attempt at shining a light on his classmates' behavior is taken at face value, he creates a club to spread his teachings, hoping his ironies will be more obvious on a grander scale. The authoritarian rule of law he establishes meets little resistance from his club members, even as he wonders privately when they'll have enough and choose a more virtuous path. While Frank earnestly seeks to help his classmates, his methodology proves misguided in practice, and Frank must find where to draw the line before he permanently ruins his beloved high school. But then again, being a cult leader is too much fun to pass up... 

You Must Remember This adapts the foundation of Catch-22 in a high school setting, applying the same notion of dystopian bureaucracy to lampoon Silicon Valley's competitive spirit and, in these politically charged times, comment on the fragility of our own democracy.  

CW: minor character death (non-graphic), dark psychological themes (e.g. gaslighting), authoritarian regimes (including references to communism and Nazism)

"Amazing, terrible, bourgeois horror"
"At first I thought the story was about silicone implants"
"I highly recommend this book to anyone who loves the classic American English course reading list or just wants to read something that will make them think."
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Just passing the time...

"The truth was that Jay Gatsby of West Egg, Long Island, sprang from his Platonic conception of himself. He was a son of God-a phrase which, if it means anything, means just that-and he must be about His Father's business, the service of a vast, vulgar, and meretricious beauty. So he invented just the sort of Jay Gatsby that a seventeen-year-old boy would be likely to invent, and to this conception he was faithful to the end."

title: To The Moon And Back | ON HOLD
description:
What do you do when the bright future which you had expected ahead of you is enfolded by a backdrop of misery, terminal illness and impending death? Surely, such inquiries should be the last of any 17-year-old's problems, but for Ellie Green, she was left without a choice. 

The final chapters of a novel is expected to be written with a traditional happy ending. But for Ellie Green her final chapters are blank, leaving her to write her own destiny. 

When Xavier Guzman - a rock band guitarist with a heart of gold enveloped within a dark tunnel of responsibilities, anger and a life of mental torment - stumbles into Ellie's rewired world, he changes her philosophy of the meaning of life, giving her the one gift she despised the most; a novel called To The Moon And Back, hoping that Ellie's eyes are open to a world which has much to offer; love, friendship and most of all, happiness. Only, he has been in search for those himself. 

Will both Ellie and Xavier be able to find what they have been in search for, or will they succumb to a dark road ready to swallow their entire future? 

Copyright © 2021
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"Begin with the end in mind."

My real name is Shyan! pen name "Sheree McKenna" or simply XFiction_GoddessX. I'm twenty-one years old, West Indian/Caribbean. I write because I think it's fun and it helps me get away from reality because quite frankly reality sucks. ✍︎︎

I'm hopelessly in love with Froy Gutierrez, Dylan O'Brien, Jungkookie and Jimin my baby mochi. Buy me chocolate and we'll be best friends (;'༎ຶٹ༎ຶ')

My characters are not complex but I can say that they're very questionable in many ways I cannot describe. I mainly write romance novels but fair warning, mostly all of my novels are mental health awareness novels to educate my readers on what it's like to live with it.♥︎

title: Returning Home
description:
This is a short story written for the Contemporary Lit Contest: A Fantabulous Easter.

Running from home after the aftermath of loss, Mari finds herself in California. Alone for Easter, she reluctantly agrees to attend a coworker's Easter party. The lingering memories of spending holidays with her family continue to pull at her as the bright cheer surrounding her ignites. What she doesn't expect is a face from her past to appear. 

Through reminiscent Easter fun, Mari begins to cherish the very things she ran from. Will it be enough to bring her home, or will the pain of her past keep her miles from the one place that still holds her heart?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Put me by the water, give me a book, and let me be. I am the type that once I start a book, I'm going to finish it. I need to know what happens, and I need to know now.  I wish I could stretch them out and enjoy them over a week or two, but that's just not me. I have grown up a Disney Child at heart. I think I always dreamed of that perfect happily ever after. After fantasizing enough about it and wishing the books I was reading had more or ended differently, I decided to write my own. It's been an amazing escape to dive into a story, whether it's my own or someone else's.

TikTok amandamichelleauthor

title: The Secrets She Kept
description:
Evelyn and Rosie had always been close. They were not just mother and daughter; they were best friends. At least, they were until disease stole away the woman Evelyn had once been.

After an incident forces Rosie's hand, she soon comes to realise there's a lot she does not know about the woman who raised her. Or about herself. 

With disease ravaging her mum's memories, Rosie is in a race against time to time to unravel her mother's secrets and uncover the truth about her fractured family.

Rosie will come face to face with not only her mum's past but the secrets she had kept hidden from herself. Will she be brave enough to face the truth and take her chance at happiness?

authorBio:
WELCOME TO CONTEMPORARY LIT

Contemporary Lit is defined by stories that are set between WWII and present day. These stories highlight real world situations lived by real world characters. Some of the more popular themes of Contemp Lit are romance, coming of age, empowerment, good vs evil, and life's injustices. We invite you to browse our reading lists, which have been hand-selected for our readers who enjoy connecting with contemporary characters. And if you have written a story that fits this genre, we invite you to visit our Profile Guide for instructions on submitting your story to our reading lists.

General tags #contemporarylit #generalfiction #contemporary #literaryfiction

title: Here Lies the Lives Left at the Altar (On Hold)
description:
When you go to a funeral, you expect three things:

1: Getting too emotional
2: Accepting a lot of empty apologies
3: Doing something stupid

What you don't expect, is a runaway bride jumping into your car and demanding you drive away as her frantic family and very angry groom chase after her.

#3 for Archer Calloway was listening to the crazy-eyed bride, Rosie Keller.

But as the two take a pit stop at a bar to work out what had just occurred, a couple of generous strangers buy them a drink. And then another. And then another... all to celebrate their "marriage".

And thus, the faux newlyweds decide to take advantage of their strange situation, and see how far they can take this unexpected, and hopefully fully-funded, honeymoon. 

Not to mention, it would just be such a shame to let that road trip from Seattle to New York City- that's already planned out and paid for- just go to waste.

Because what harm can they cause that they haven't already?

title: Fragments of Fortune (ONC 2021)
description:
⋆☆⋆ ONC 2021 Longlister
⋆☆⋆ #1 on the #Opennovellacontest2021 on December 6, 2021

Gāyathri is a strong willed girl. A survivor. And an orphan.

Bruised and broken from the accident which claimed her parents' lives, she is unsure of her future when she learns of the terms of her father's will.  She is reluctant to stay with her paternal grandparents, whom she has never seen, but with four weeks to her eighteenth birthday, she is still a minor and has no choice but follow her father's wishes.

She plans to stay the required four weeks and then live her life on her terms.

Gāyathri is determined to dislike her grandparents and the family she has never met. Armed with a ceramic jar filled with notes that her father scribbled on, she takes comfort from those words, convinced her father is still around to guide her. 

What she encounters is not what she expected. What she learns, she never imagined. It gradually shreds her assumptions and shatters her preconceived notions. The final truth, albeit a small one, leaves her desolate and desperate.

It forces her to reassess everything she has believed. And to make a choice. 

To accept that her life was a lie and run away from the family she had always wanted to belong to. Or to use the fragments of truth to be the daughter she wanted to be.

❉ Genre: General 

❉ Submission for ONC 2021 - based on prompts  30, 33 and 74

❉ Cover Credit - painting: halfsaree_girl_by_padmakrishna_db410g5 on DeviantArt.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
By birth -An eternal optimist ( a true Libran in that sense) and a hopeless romantic (in so far as it fits the definition of the word as being whimsical, imaginative and creative, though not too sure about the last one)

By nature - an introvert who talks too much (not an oxymoron, recent studies find this very plausible and quite likely)

By profession - an accountant, who believes that numbers are absolute and people are manipulative. So all the creativity I will not and should not show in numbers seeps into writing.

By necessity - a reader, I read as I need to breathe. I read a lot; fiction, articles, billboards and posters while driving, product labels when shopping and even bags made out of old newspapers

By habit - a collector of hobbies - somehow cannot stay interested for long in any one of them

By passion - a lisztomaniac - music, always around me and in my head too

By indulgence - coffee, chocolates and cakes - my choice of poison

By choice - a writer- which is a recent phenomenon. I have always been writing stories in my head though earlier, I would rarely put them down on paper. But once I started, I seem to have turned into a scripturient being. I also write for I once felt that I could create worlds that I can control, unfortunately I have learnt that much like life and reality, it is not so, after some time, the characters take over and in some cases also determine the course of the story. (Believe me, it is true, one story of mine disappeared because the characters ran amok with it. I do not think I will ever be able to write it out.)

By now it is apparent that I can ramble while writing too....

authorBio:
I am an Urban Author, I officially started writing when I was about 12-13. Writing all kinds of stories and taking it to school for other kids to read. I'd have only one notebook, and would past it around and each class. Thinking about it now, I'm the reason a lot of teachers were upset kids weren't doing their work, because they were to busy reading my stories. (I apologize to all the teachers) lol. As I grew up, I started writing Urban stores, I used to see a lot of things growing up with five sisters and three brothers, so I used to write what I went though. Raised in Palm beach county, I'm 30 years old, Aries baby and I'm in the works of my own publishing company, PrettyRoyatly & Co. title: Spring of Rose
description:
"Is this the right decision? After all this time, the months of pain and fear and overwhelming anxiousness, is this okay?" 

Rose no longer knew what was and wasn't okay in her new world. 

                                                                                                 ****

Rose Pavillon life is about to change. This simple city woman throws away the safety of a stable job to begin her own paranormal business in Clay Grove. While her career choices may begin to look rocky, her life at home looks bright as she prepares for a spring wedding and has to deal with in-law's opinions. 

However, a pandemic soon rocks the waters that surround Rose and places her in the crosshairs of bankruptcy and a love crisis. All it took was one stay-at-home order to bring secrets to light and pave a road that could destroy Rose's once brought world. 

To survive the unclear future, Rose will need to trust not only the ex-Army soldier, who harbors more than a mysterious past but the other members of ParaNORmal Activities. Together, Rose searches for ways to prove that ghosts are real while keeping her business afloat. However, the challenge proves to be harder than they could have thought as riots break out and Rose comes across a job that threatens them all.


Target Audience: New Adult
Genre: Contempary Thriller/Paranormal

title: FLAMES & DESIRES
description:
She inhales, then exhales, "Well, I wish that your wildest dreams come true and that we both learn how to set the rain on fire."
"You weren't supposed to waste your wish on me, Talia."
She brushes my hair with her fingers, "I didn't, though. It was a wish for both of us. Anyway, it doesn't matter now. I've already made the wish.
"Alright, so tell me more about setting the rain on fire. How do you suppose we do it?" We stay in each other's arms, rocking back and forth.
"I don't know yet. Maybe I'll devise a plan soon. Do you think you're up for the challenge?"
I don't think I've stopped smiling since the moment she got in my car, "For you? Anything." ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Talia Monroe, a girl with a passion for fire, meets Michael Harrison, a shy guy with a big heart. Talia has one wish, and that is to set the rain on fire, and Michael is willing to help her. After a simple experiment, one wish quickly becomes an obsession, leading them both down a series of high crimes and arson. 
It doesn't take them long to become the most wanted criminals all over the country. Will their love survive it all, or will it burn under the high pressures of their notorious names? Passionate love meets a fiery obsession in this never before seen novel!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi guys, thank you for stopping by! Please get yourself situated and enjoy my newest book called "Set The Rain on Fire."

My name is Blessing, but you can call me Blessy. Here are some facts about me!
I love to read and write with a passion,
I'm a political science major.
I love writing out of the box, crazy stories with lots of emotions AND laughs.
I care about representation in books :)
My favorite book is Heartless by Melissa Myers.
My favorite movie is A Walk To Remember.
I LOVE to burn candles. My fascination with fire and flames inspired me to write TSTRF.
I'm not new to Wattpad (been reading these books for years!) But I am a new Wattpad writer

Please be engaging. I will be updating the book regularly with new parts almost every day! Thank you!

title: Jordynn's Journey
description:
"You can always make time if you want to make time." 
--------------------------
Jordynn Miller. She is what people would call 'closed off' or someone who is introverted and more to herself but she is so much more than that. Between paying the bills in her toxic household, working at her local clothing store, and maintaining straight A's, this high school student always appears to have her hands full. 

Jamal King. He's what people would call a 'popular jock' but like Jordynn, he's much more than what appears on the surface. Similar to Jordynn he deals with family issues and just wants to get away. He believes sports is his way out. He plays both football and basketball and he is damn sure good at it. He is busy with sports and training that he tends to slip up with his grades. 

What will happen when these two busy-body's cross paths and attract one another? Will they be able to fit each other in their hectic worlds?

Read on to find out!

title: milkbath | Suds 2
description:
A mini-soap opera about Love & Drama among college co-eds. This season we're soaking in a milkbath of bubbles and toiling troubles. Fall semester has arrived.

Mira is back on the scene-high on life-after an HIV scare. Her ex, Sylus, takes an interest in a new girl on campus. And Mira gladly tries new things.

Leilah and Darien are still in cuddle mode, but Darien has to decide if he should tell Leilah that her brother was catching heat before he got shot. Can their budding romance survive the secret's blow?

Friends turn Foes and Lovers become Friends as the chamomile milkbath brims over the porcelain bathtub this season on Suds. It's gonna be a milkbath, Boo!!

title: Beast Within
description:
Kaia Wells is always running for her life. For the last couple of years, she's been dodging the worst kinds of people, lurking in the shadows. She's done running now. This is her last resort, finding safety in a small town. Her plans to keep a low profile go right out the window after the arrival of new visitors. 

The Blaine brothers are devilishly handsome - and surprisingly single. Everyone's wondering why the most eligible bachelors aren't tied up with anyone, even months after they moved in. 

Unknown to Kaia, a terrible curse was placed on the four boys as adolescents. Every night, they're free of their curses - searching endlessly to find their "cure." One kiss, true of intent and pure love, can change their fates forever.

With the oldest Blaine getting closer and closer to his birthday, he begins to rush to find the girl of his dreams. If he doesn't, he'll be stuck with his curse for life. 

-----
**THIS IS BEAUTY AND THE BEAST RE-IMAGINED.**

authorBio:
WELCOME TO CONTEMPORARY LIT

Contemporary Lit is defined by stories that are set between WWII and present day. These stories highlight real world situations lived by real world characters. Some of the more popular themes of Contemp Lit are romance, coming of age, empowerment, good vs evil, and life's injustices. We invite you to browse our reading lists, which have been hand-selected for our readers who enjoy connecting with contemporary characters. And if you have written a story that fits this genre, we invite you to visit our Profile Guide for instructions on submitting your story to our reading lists.

General tags #contemporarylit #generalfiction #contemporary #literaryfiction


In our Guidebook you will find:

📔Our Reading List Guidelines

📔How to Submit to our Reading List

📔How to Become an Ambassador

📔A subscriber link to the Creator's Newsletter

Looking to enter a writing challenge or contest? Check out the available Ambassador Contests and Challenges here!




This profile is run and maintained by a team of Ambassadors who are not Wattpad staff. Ambassadors are regular Wattpaders who volunteer their time to the community. 

Please don't advertise on our profile. Only stories submitted via our submission form will be considered.

title: Sweet Like Candy
description:
Gianna Moore is a Senior in high school who lives by herself. Well, not officially but she might as well. Her two best friends, Drea and Ethan, are always there to make sure she never feels alone. The two of them have been the main people her life for years. So when another person starts to become a large part of her life, he seems to throw everything off.
Adrien Morgen is a mystery. He rarely speaks or shows emotion, and the two only people in the school you might see him around are his best friend, Marcus, and his younger sister, Heather. That is until he can't help but begin to get attached to Gianna, too. 
But can a bubbly, caring girl and a quiet, closed off guy actually be good for each other? Or has the guy Gianna really needs been right in front of here face the whole time?

title: Echoes of Twilight
description:
"Echoes of Twilight" delves deep into the intertwining lives of its characters, weaving a tapestry of emotions, mysteries, and revelations. Set against the backdrop of a small, picturesque town, the novel explores themes of love, loss, identity, and the unseen forces that shape our destinies.

At its heart, the story follows Sean, a young man haunted by the shadows of his past and the mysteries surrounding his father's disappearance. As he navigates through life's challenges, Sean finds unexpected connections with others-Emmy, a beacon of warmth and mystery; Hope, a steadfast friend with secrets of her own; and Lucas, a confidant whose loyalty is tested by the unfolding events.

The novel unfolds like a symphony, each chapter resonating with echoes of the past and promises of the future. As Sean delves deeper into his father's enigmatic legacy, he uncovers a web of secrets that threaten to unravel everything he holds dear. Yet, amidst the darkness, there are glimmers of hope and moments of profound connection that illuminate his path forward.

Through vivid prose and evocative storytelling, "Echoes of Twilight" invites readers to embark on a journey of self-discovery, where the boundaries between truth and illusion blur, and where the echoes of the past shape the present in unexpected ways.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: As a dedicated and emerging author, I possess a unique talent for transforming lives into compelling narratives. My writing encompasses both fiction and non-fiction, delving into the often overlooked truths of our world. Through my work, I strive to spread love, peace, and positivity, creating stories that resonate deeply with readers and inspire meaningful reflection.

authorBio:
BATAYAH is a unique Hebrew name, which means Daughter of Yahweh. Batayah like her name, is a uniquely gifted and talented singer, songwriter, arranger, composer and producer of music; who also loves, has trained and participated and currently participates in many other forms and expressions of art as well.



Beginning at the tender age of four years old, Batayah began singing in live events. Shortly thereafter, at age eight, she was introduced to acting and therefore she began acting in church, school and community plays. She was then noticed and trained to participate in  oratorical events at age ten, which led to many other speaking engagements. At age twelve Batayah was invited to start modeling. Almost immediately, she moved on to runway modeling events, commercials, television and dance shows; however, no matter what form of entertainment she participated in, she always came back to the music and continued to inspire others through music, as music became her overall passion and a part of everything that she would do, going forward.



Batayah began to realize that what she was gifted to do, wasn't simply entertainment; it was healing for the mind, body and soul! Soon after, she began writing and producing soulful songs that truly expressed her powerful gifts and anointing as a singer, songwriter, arranger, composer and producer. In 2009, Batayah opened a Record Label and a Publishing Company, which  have both been in operation for more than thirteen years.



Batayah's Published Projects are available on all platforms and include: "BATAYAH - Daughter of Yahweh", "Simply BATAYAH" and "Soulfully Free". Some of her most popular singles are entitled "WOKE", "LOVE" and "Alive Well & Free". Three of Batayah's most popular Published Spoken Word and Motivational Projects are: "Dedication", "Appreciation" and "Motivation",  and are also available on all platforms. Instagram: @theartistbatayah Facebook: @theartistbatayah Twitter: @ARTISTBATAYAH

authorBio:
My pen name is Chauna-lea Tricia Mikien. I'm 35. My birthday is on March 14, 1988. I'm an author, singer, songwriter, designer, & entrepreneur.

I read & write thrillers, mystery, YA, NA, paranormal, urban fic (Contemporary Lit), suspense, horror, etc. I only listen & watch something if it is good. I published an article in a magazine in 2012.

My favorite authors are R.L. Stine, Dana Davidson, J.D. Mason, S.E. Hinton, Lois Duncan, Patricia Cornwell, James Patterson, J.T. Ellison, Joan Lowery Nixon, etc.

I already completed 6 stories now. This is the list below. I plan to self-publish these novels starting in 2023 in this order.

title: Give me you

Join aluana and Trico on the journey through college and see where life takes them. Will they find each other and be the perfect match or will they just bring each other headaches and bad luck.

title: Everything Fragile✔
description:
"And with one little touch, everything came crashing down..."

▪︎▪︎▪︎

Life changes. And most times for the best, but for Quince Delco? Definitely for the worse.

When a simple shift at work turned deadly leads to her becoming an overnight sensation, Quince doesn't know how to react. Afterall, surviving a shooting at the infamous Marina Restaurant and saving the owner's daughter all in one night isn't something she'd ever think she'd put on her resume. Yet, there she was: a hero to the eyes of so many, but even heroes have their own secrets.

Things are difficult to keep buried in Kingston and Quince will have to learn that the hard way when the notorious Caleb Gonzalez comes knocking at her door with his nephew, Mateo Dela Cruz, and - at their heels - a curious reporter looking for answers.

For Quince, it's a matter of differentiating allies from foes, but the line between the two is so frustratingly thin.

title: On the Brink of Bloom (demo)
description:
Summer 2028. Dotty Godman, a finance genius, faces a horrible finding: asteroid Apophis is about to hit Earth next April. She decides to fight back and save her family. She knows whom to turn to: her ex-friend Bash Venters, an EV and space tech billionaire.
The society is in turmoil. Environmental worries and recent market crash have turned masses to millennialist doomsday cult. Countries and international organizations are stuck in political squabbling. Controversial business leaders are the ones who can safe the Earth, but they have their own deep designs. What are the true motivations?
Saving the Earth, Dotty Godman is about to sacrifice has personal life, including marriage with her husband, an ambitious and neurotic artist. To top the trouble, her a KGB-connection smear campaign is directed at her father, who dies in suspicious circumstances, and Dotty's daughter Elisa has her own grandiose plans with extremist Green Dusk movement.
Less than a year. French Riviera. Silicon Valley. Latvia. Saharan desert. The multi layered psychological thriller pushes humanity's face into the mirror. How did we get here? What gives us power to go on, if at all? How to cope with the constant feeling of being on the brink of bloom and not getting there? Maybe, even facing a deadly asteroid, the greatest disasters happen in persons' minds.
Critics say the novel is far from "just sci-fi" and rather reminds them of Michel Houellebecq, Graham Greene or George Orwell.

Example chapters translated from Estonian by Kristel Kont
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Vahur Afanasjev (born 24 August 1979) is an Estonian writer.

Afanasjev began his writing career with poems and lyrics in 1995. In 1997-98, he published three poetry collections on the internet. His first poems were published in the Estonian literary magazine Vikerkaar in 1998. He has published poetry books, short stories, and novels. His works have been published in several collections of various authors in English, Finnish, Russian, Romanian, Dutch, and Hungarian.[1]

title: hi, tea for one? • contemporary rom-lit
description:
𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐩𝐢𝐫𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐲: 𝐅𝐢𝐟𝐭𝐲 𝐒𝐡𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐆𝐫𝐞𝐲 (𝐰𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐧 𝐛𝐲 𝐄.𝐋. 𝐉𝐚𝐦𝐞𝐬) 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐒𝐨𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝟏𝟎𝟏 (𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐲 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐬𝐞𝐢𝐲)

Love hasn't been in a kindred spirit after years of inheriting her mother's business once she had called and announced to the public of her retirement. Of course, Love had always been the company's heiress, so she lived up to the dreams of her mother's wonderful stories. Except, she didn't know how awfully tedious and stressful it can get when it came to trying to figuring out what script or story would she'd benefit from producing it?

So, of course, as a natural instinct to wind down from a yet another stressful day of hearing endless stories that are often clichés and, mind her language, dumb, premises, she goes to her favourite café. 

❝ 𝘏𝘪, 𝘵𝘦𝘢 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘰𝘯𝘦? ❞
❝ 𝘔𝘢𝘬𝘦 𝘪𝘵 𝘵𝘸𝘰. 𝘈𝘯𝘥 𝘢 𝘤𝘰𝘰𝘬𝘪𝘦. 𝘛𝘸𝘰 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘰𝘴𝘦 𝘢𝘴 𝘸𝘦𝘭𝘭... ❞

title: Writer Interviews
description:
HERE you will find interviews with our talented writers. You've enjoyed their stories, now here's your chance to learn what makes them tick.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
WELCOME TO CONTEMPORARY LIT

Contemporary Lit is defined by stories that are set between WWII and present day. These stories highlight real world situations lived by real world characters. Some of the more popular themes of Contemp Lit are romance, coming of age, empowerment, good vs evil, and life's injustices. We invite you to browse our reading lists, which have been hand-selected for our readers who enjoy connecting with contemporary characters. And if you have written a story that fits this genre, we invite you to visit our Profile Guide for instructions on submitting your story to our reading lists.

General tags #contemporarylit #generalfiction #contemporary #literaryfiction


In our Guidebook you will find:

📔Our Reading List Guidelines

📔How to Submit to our Reading List

📔How to Become an Ambassador

📔A subscriber link to the Creator's Newsletter

Looking to enter a writing challenge or contest? Check out the available Ambassador Contests and Challenges here!




This profile is run and maintained by a team of Ambassadors who are not Wattpad staff. Ambassadors are regular Wattpaders who volunteer their time to the community. 

Please don't advertise on our profile. Only stories submitted via our submission form will be considered.

The thought of being acquainted to the hottest and viral actor was out of her bucket list as she promised herself to forget about him. However, it seemed as though the strings of fate were never untangled when Emma became the photographer for the Nigel's new movie. Though she feels something, she was afraid to go for it as her uncertainties clouded her mind and heart. Will her heart be ever mended?

title: Smell The Roses
description:
Adanni Kingsbury is a 21-year-old girl who's dream is to be an artist. She can admit that to everyone but who counts, her mother. Mainly because her mom believes art or music as a career is a waste of time. Could be because of her father, or her mom never trying to aim for her own dreams, she hoped one day she would get the courage to find out.

Maybe the returning person back in town can inspire her, or maybe he'll just teach her that no one's opinion counts anyway including his own. Go on this journey with Adanni to realize that the only support she truly needed all this time was her own.




#37 in Black Stories

title: COTW: A Thin Line
description:
Every week, I'll share a free chapter from one of my steamy, engaging Black romance novels. I hope you enjoy, come back for more, and visit my website for details on how to buy my novels in eBook, paperback and audio. 

This week, I'm featuring A Thin Line, my spring 2020 release. This is a hate-to-happily-ever-after Black romance about two former sweethearts, mired in years of petty squabbling, who don't know they're still in love. A clever ploy, hatched by their recently engaged best friends, designed to push them back together and rekindle a long-dead romance could never work. 
Right? 
Well.. there's a thin line between love and hate

description:

authorBio:
My pen name is Chauna-lea Tricia Mikien. I'm 35. My birthday is on March 14, 1988. I'm an author, singer, songwriter, designer, & entrepreneur.

I read & write thrillers, mystery, YA, NA, paranormal, urban fic (Contemporary Lit), suspense, horror, etc. I only listen & watch something if it is good. I published an article in a magazine in 2012.

My favorite authors are R.L. Stine, Dana Davidson, J.D. Mason, S.E. Hinton, Lois Duncan, Patricia Cornwell, James Patterson, J.T. Ellison, Joan Lowery Nixon, etc.

I already completed 6 stories now. This is the list below. I plan to self-publish these novels starting in 2023 in this order.

title: Breathe Again
description:
Life is....suffocating. Opinions pollute the air. Broken hope, like sharp miniscule particles, lingers around, grazing the psyches of people that pass.
 
Life is....suffocating. So much so that we often forget how to breathe. 

But boy....

But girl....

....does it feel good to breathe again.

title: Shadow Life: Anemone on Promise Hill Novella
description:
Anne is living her university life day by day, keeping her head down and wanting to start anew after graduation. However, her nightly dreams become daily nightmares when she meets Damon from her past life--Anemone's past life. Anne learns that her life is a mere shadow of Anemone's life that ended at the age of 23. 

Anne is 22, turning 23 in a few weeks.

Will Anne run away or choose a different ending that has already been destined for her?

title: The Shy Boy
description:
Fate brings together two lost souls in a beautiful love story.
                                      ✩      ✩      ✩    

Samira Ellis had almost everything anyone could ever want: a picturesque life, a man who is madly in love with her, and a position at one of the top universities in the world. But deep down she knew something was still missing, something that would only be found by a chance encounter with the shy boy who would become her everything.

Ezra Mitchell, has never been the most confident, but with the death of his father he's had to step up to help with the restaurant. He is certain everything is going good for him - until he meets Samira Ellis. With her, his whole world is turned upside down.


Disclaimer: This story contains mature themes & strong language!

title: Spell Stoner: Black Girl Magic
description:
The first book in the Affinity Series, Spell Stoner is the coming-of-age story about a young girl named Zen Rose. She lives in a quarantine zone in Brownsville, Brooklyn that's plagued with a health, economic and social crisis. Within the institutional racism of generational poverty, Zen finds her magic. She discovers her ability to conjure spells from healing stones. She embarks on a journey to find herself and save her community.

title: Letters on Fire
description:
A short story about love, loss and a new beginning.

Twenty years have already passed since the death of his beloved Rose, but Ron is still unable to move on.

One of the reasons he still suffers so much, might be the cruel, mysterious letters-- letters accusing him of murder.

Will Lily, his best friend, be able to help him?
Will Ron be willing to start a new life, after all this time?

title: Rose
description:
Rose Ijeoma Adichie had no intention of falling in love when she went off to college as her studies were her only concern. But, that all changed when she met the man of her dreams, billionaire Malik Wallace who shows her the finer things in life. The two become smitten over one another as time goes on, exchange "I love you's", all without a title. Rose starts to question whether or not Malik will ever make her his girlfriend after two years of seeing each other. Malik doesn't do titles, and it eventually becomes a problem for Rose. Being the daughter of Nigerian parents that never wanted her to focus on men while being in school, Rose wonders whether or not to let go the one she loves who doesn't claim her around the people who matter most in their lives.

Disclaimer: This story contains mature language and suggestive content.

title: Who am I to you? | Oscar Diaz
description:
𝕃𝕚𝕗𝕖 𝕚𝕤 ℍ𝕒𝕣𝕕,
                     
                      𝔽𝕚𝕘𝕙𝕥𝕚𝕟𝕘 𝕚𝕤 𝔼𝕒𝕤𝕪.

𝕎𝕙𝕖𝕟 𝕝𝕠𝕧𝕖 𝕚𝕤 𝕚𝕟𝕧𝕠𝕝𝕧𝕖𝕕 𝕥𝕙𝕚𝕟𝕘𝕤 𝕔𝕒𝕟 𝕘𝕖𝕥 𝕔𝕠𝕞𝕡𝕝𝕚𝕔𝕒𝕥𝕖𝕕.

_•_•_•_•_•_•_•_•_•_•_

ᴏꜱᴄᴀʀ ᴅɪᴀᴢ ᴀɴᴅ xɪᴏᴍᴀʀᴀ ꜰɪɴɴɪᴇ, ᴅᴇꜱᴘɪᴛᴇ ʜᴀᴠɪɴɢ ᴀꜰꜰɪʟɪᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱ ᴡɪᴛʜ ʀɪᴠᴀʟ ꜱᴛʀᴇᴇᴛ ɢᴀɴɢꜱ, ʟᴀɴᴛɪo ʟᴏꜱ ꜱᴀɴᴛᴏꜱ, ᴀɴᴅ ʙʟᴀᴄᴋꜱ ᴘʀᴏᴘʜᴇᴛꜱ, ꜰᴀʟʟꜱ ɪɴ ʟᴏᴠᴇ ɪɴ ɢᴀɴɢ ɪɴꜰᴇꜱᴛᴇᴅ ꜱᴏᴜᴛʜ ᴄᴇɴᴛʀᴀʟ ʟᴏꜱ ᴀɴɢᴇʟᴇꜱ.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
ᴀ 20-ꜱᴏᴍᴇᴛʜɪɴɢ ʏᴇᴀʀ ᴏʟᴅ ᴀɴᴛɪꜱᴏᴄɪᴀʟ ɴᴇʀᴅ ᴛʜᴀᴛ ꜱᴘᴇɴᴅꜱ ᴍᴏʀᴇ ᴛɪᴍᴇ ᴡɪᴛʜ ꜰɪᴄᴛɪᴏɴᴀʟ ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀꜱ ɪɴꜱᴛᴇᴀᴅ ᴏꜰ ꜱᴏᴄɪᴀʟɪᴢɪɴɢ ᴡɪᴛʜ ʀᴇᴀʟ ᴘᴇᴏᴘʟᴇ.

title: Dalila's Enigma
description:
Dalila was left with nothing...

 Except for her father's $650,000 home and booming business. She's been prepped with the entire possibility of her parents' dying and being left with an inheritance.

Right?

title: Black Girl Working
description:
Raised by her Grandmother after the untimely death of her parents at age 16, Khasheena Kane puts her focus into being the Doctor that her always wanted her to be. 

However, pursuing her dreams becomes increasingly difficult after graduating from University. 

Not able to land a job at any of the prestigious institutions she applies to, Khasheena settles into a reluctant position at a less than reputable clinic. 

The Director, a snarky, entitled, good-for-nothing playboy, who calls himself her boss, adds spark to her career oriented life, drawing out the bright side in Khasheena that she didn't know she'd lost. 

Will Khasheena shy way from love as she struggles to build a name for herself and the clinic she is now committed to saving? Or will she embrace this romantic freedom and grow with this seemingly reckless playboy?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Box of Chocolates
description:
'Life is like a box of chocolates. You never know what you're gonna get,' Forrest Gump once wisely said.

This compilation of flash fiction 'shorts' (mostly between 500-3000 words) is like that, too. These stories are all utterly unlike each other, full of different flavours and surprises. 

You never know what you're gonna get... but if you don't like the one you are reading, just leaf through it and skip to the next one.

Enjoy!

title: JongHyun's Base
description:
Fresh out of the army, Shinee thought that they would go back to former promotions but there's one big problem. JongHyun hasn't been able to write any potential songs since going into the army so he leaves Seoul for New York, looking for his sound again. But JongHyun's new muse doesn't want anything casual and he's wary of falling too deep.

Noelle is a nurse at Brooklyn Center Hospital and has been in an interracial relationship before and it ended abruptly when her boyfriend dumped her because of his traditional minded parents. Noelle's drawn to the passionate JongHyun and wants all that he has to offer and more.

But Noelle doesn't know who JongHyun is and he has to find the courage to tell her that more than just someone's parents judging her, a whole league of fans both Korean and international will be looking at them. Can JongHyun convince her that their love is worth any criticism they may face, or will Noelle's fear keep them from the happiness they're sure to find in each other?

title: All The Things I've Yet to Do
description:
"Here," I say, passing the paper to my left. "We need to finish this by the end of summer."

I pray that no one asks a certain question as my list continues to circulate. One by one, devilish grins form on the faces of my friends.

"I'm in," they begin to repeat after one another.

-

Everyone has a number of things that they wish to experience in their lifetime. On a particularly lonely night, Amaya begins to dwell on her deepest desires. Finally, she devises a plan. Of course, she cannot carry this out on her own, so without much explanation, she alerts her friends. After finishing their first year of university, they decide to make the most of their extensive break.

What is it that's so important about this summer?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Keychains ✔
description:
FEATURED ON WATTPAD'S LOW FANTASY PROFILE 

It's been ten years since Nora Whelan ran away, taking with her the painful secrets that shattered her family. Her ability to peer into other people's lives had saved her own. Now as the marketing manager of a technological enterprise, Nora is determined to succeed and leave her past failures behind.

But when Nora discovers she's to inherit her family's old house, she must confront her past, as well as the truth behind her visions.

As Nora dives deeper into the fractured past of her family, she is faced with a difficult question: What is worth fixing, and what is better left behind? 

-

authorBio:
🍂student (she/her)

🖋️I write magical realism. Keychains and Backstage are a part of my New Adult contemporary trilogy. Read Keychains if you're interested in retrocognition, family ties, sad backstories and forgiveness. On the other hand, if music, identity, and LBGTQ+/disability representation sounds like your cup of tea, you'll love Backstage.

🖋️My poetry collection Cement City is largely inspired by the prose of Langston-Hughes. I like simple, direct language - but that doesn't mean there isn't a ton of nuance under a few words.

🖋️Nightly Montage is a collection of mixed-genre one-shots, spanning all the way back to the summer of 2019, when I wrote my first short story.

✨Beautiful profile pic and banner drawn by the famous Nittan, a dear friend of mine. From left to right: myself, Reese, J Sun, Nittan. Thank you <3

🇻🇳 If you are a Vietnamese writer with Vietnamese main characters in your story, please let me know. I would love to read it (as long as it's PG) and connect with you.

Please, no promoting on my message board. Those messages will be kindly ignored and deleted.

(P.S. If I have added you to a genre reading list, it means I *really* enjoyed your book.)

description:
Dmitri Pavlyuchenko is apathetic, arrogant, and abrasive, and no amount of partying, drinking, smoking, or casual sex will change that. At least, that's what he thinks until he meets Alan Huntington, who challenges his worldview and opens him up to new experiences. 

Eventually, he starts to see that there's more to life than being a hardass hooker and that he and Alan have more in common than they think. 

Will he finally admit to himself that he's not totally immune to falling in love?

title: COTW: The Never List
description:
Every week, I'll share a free chapter from one of my steamy, engaging Black romance novels. I hope you enjoy, come back for more, and visit my website for details on how to buy my novels in eBook, paperback and audio. 

This week, I'm featuring The Never List, my most recent release from September 2020. 

Esme Whitaker has held out on an important rite for just the right person at just the right time. She's had a recent glow-up full of accomplishments to be proud of, but there's still a list of adventures to cross off before her 40th birthday.

Take a flight. Swim in the ocean. Eat exotic food. Have sex.

On the cusp of her 40th birthday, the time is now. All she needs the right man. When a date with a potential love interest goes veEry, very wrong, she's rescued by a tall, bearded, stylish gentleman. What could have been wonderful fizzles instantly; the vibe between them crackles with animosity.

Sometimes, though, you get a second chance to make a first impression.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Through A Looking Glass
description:
Have you ever wondered if everyone got hurt too? if anyone could even imagine the amount of pain you were going through? Have you ever wished someone could just understand?
Well, I do. {kinda}

Here, you can find quotes, poems, or just a few snippets from within the author's mind, all based on relatable experiences. This book is all about looking through someone else's eyes and understanding yourself through them.
Just a few words put together by a teenager to produce something that might be worth your time. They are about love, loss, pain, and self-worth.

I'm not too good with descriptions but I can promise the inside is way better.
Have fun!

~*~*~*~

authorBio:
Not Taking Reading Requests.

Open your heart, close your eyes, and fall; it's love
Never frighten someone so much, they forget what fear is.
My mom told me to follow my dreams so I went back to bed.

Hey guys, I'm May, a 15-year-old, soon to be in Grade 12 of high school. I am a certified graphic designer and author. I am a fairly okay person, just trying to survive high school and pursue my dream in aeronautical engineering and fantasy writing, I hope you can help me out however you can. I have spent two years taking psychology classes at an institute and as of my birthday, May 1st, 2020, I am now an ascertained emotional psychologist. I am a perfectionist and a goal-getter and I think I can do anything I put my mind to.

Hobbies: reading, writing, dancing.
Things I love: supporting people going through depression, singing offkey, making money and graphic arts, penguins, writing, winning prizes and I also like mocking celebrities, my teachers, and politicians who behave irresponsibly on tv. I love cake, ice cream, fashion, photography and so much more.

I can make you happy, angry, or simply frustrated but you can always count on me to be your friend when you need me.

My works;  (All of which mean the world to me.)

title: A Servant Boy And The Vampire Princess
description:
Jake gets into a terrible accident one night when he is with his highschool sweetheart Amanda and becomes unconscious.

When he finally comes to, he is in what seems to be a world of vampires where they sleep in the day and awake in the night.

He is taken in as a servant in the castle where he realises Amanda, princess of the vampires, who owns him. She has no idea who he is but Jake is determined to make her remember him and who they used to be.

Throughout all this, Jake holds strong memories of his higschool life and journals as much as he can remember for the memories he has of his past life fade every single day until one day his journal looks like a fantasy book pulled straight out of the library.

His days in the castle are unknown but the main question is, will he ever get out and will Amanda remember anything out of it ?

title: What Lies Beneath the Fog
description:
@YARomance Undiscovered Book of the Month, December 2022

Multiple times featured.

The magic of first love, set against the backdrop of a small island hidden beneath a mysterious fog.

At first sight, the tiny Foggy Island promises Liam an uneventful summer, with the haunting prospect of starting a new school at the end of it. But does this magical, sleepy place hide something else? Is there something, someone lurking beneath the fog, expecting him? Maybe an old mystery waiting to be solved?

Trigger warning: An old case of suicide is mentioned in the story. It is a part of the unsolved mystery from the Victorian Era and doesn't directly affect any of the main characters. 

This story was crafted around three short words : a broken key, an old book, a smell of rain.

title: Bad Memories
description:
I walk past the two boys and go to Angelo. Before I could say anything he asked "Why are up and walking? You should be relaxing"

"Cause I feel fine and you know I'm not taking these damn pills" I explained. Then I threw the pills at him. 

"You need em and I'm not doing this right now. I have my boys over go call Mya or Niya" he replied while putting the pills in my hand. 

As I get up to go back to his, I see the same boy from the mall. He looked up at me and he smirked at me and smacked my butt. I quickly turned around and grabbed his face. 

Go through an adventure with La'shae Jackson. Discover all the Bad Memories she's uncovering during her pregnancy.

title: The Last Oak
description:
Austin Hardy doesn't know what to expect when he climbs out of his bedroom window at 1AM and joins his long-time crush, Lexie, and her best friend, Madison, in Lexie's red Honda. Lexie's organized a sit-in protest to protect Oak Cove's most famous tree, which is about to be cut down. Little do they know this will pit them against the adults that run the small beach town of Oak Cove and get them in more trouble than they ever expected!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My journey as a writer began when I was seventeen. I felt isolated as a teen and trapped in a cage. I was determined to break free but didn't have a clue how to do this. I couldn't find a novelist that spoke to me about these feelings, so I began to journal to make sure I'd never forget what I was going through. I was determined I'd return from adulthood one day and write a coming-of-age novel for someone like me.

I'm a very creative person. In addition to writing, I paint, dance, cook, and act and have won awards for cooking and acting. These other arts help connect me to Universal Creative Energy and strengthen my writing. They also encourage a child-like enjoyment of life, which is a key to being happy, I believe.

A part of me writes selfishly. I love when a character speaks to me and tells me what she's thinking or what he wants to do next, and I just take dictation!

But I also write for my readers - my tribe. I write to connect with them and give them a great story filled with quirky, interesting characters that feel like old friends. My stories share life's magic and mystery, a sense of that unknowable Intelligence some call God. (The animals around us are part of that invisible fabric, so I always write animals into my novels.)

My stories are as much about the journeys my characters take as the end-goals they achieve. I've spent 99% of my life traveling and maybe 1% arriving at my goals. As we voyage through life, it's important we laugh as much as possible, cry when we need to, love when we can, and dance in whatever way dancing means to us. My stories help my readers celebrate their lives, not just the sweet parts, but the salty times as well.

Life isn't always easy. I feel compassion for how hard we human beings try to get it right. My deepest wish is that my stories encourage my readers on their journey and give them hope!

title: THEDE
description:
A Southern African settings story of what seems to be an impossible love in the midst of tribal differences and racial fumes. A story of friendship, diversity and adventure, taking you along the journey of self discovery as Nothando, "Mother of love" finds belonging in lands not of her birthing. She learns to stand courageous of her love and strives to tear down the walls that divide her people. 

Sheds light to the concept of "ubuntu"- an African ideology focusing on the spirit of togetherness, people's allegiances and relations with each other- how African nations can flourish as one by embracing "ubuntu" as more than the unity of one's own thede, but by breaking down the boundaries we've all come to set and accept amongst our kind.

All rights reserved to
N.M. BLXCK
©2020

My pen name is Chauna-lea Tricia Mikien. I'm 35. My birthday is on March 14, 1988. I'm an author, singer, songwriter, designer, & entrepreneur.

I read & write thrillers, mystery, YA, NA, paranormal, urban fic (Contemporary Lit), suspense, horror, etc. I only listen & watch something if it is good. I published an article in a magazine in 2012.

Instead, she gets caught in a series of chance encounters with an unusual stranger. There's something different about Kai, and Amaya is determined to figure out his secrets. Luckily, Kai is happy to bring her along as he explores coral reefs and ancient caves. It isn't long before he seems like more than a friend. 

But Kai isn't the only one with a hidden past. If Amaya wants to keep the new life she's built for herself, she'll need to untangle her family's secrets...unless they catch up to her first.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey! I'm Chrysa, a twenty-something university student with a passion for fantasy. I also dabble in science fiction and contemporary lit whenever my crazy schedule allows. When I'm not guzzling coffee or cramming for exams, you can find me watching movies, improving my photography, or cooking something (hopefully) delicious.

If you haven't already, feel free to check out my two stories, Daughter of the Sea and Made of Metal. I'd love to hear what you think!

title: Fall to Pieces
description:
In an instant the word pain was redefined...

August Taylor thought she could manage the weight of the world on her shoulders. Forcing a smile, she hid the secrets of the man she loved and pretended everything was okay. Until she found him unconscious, having chosen his addiction over her ... one last, fatal time. 

Unable to understand the sickness that consumed him, grief rivets through August's body. As she spirals into self-destructive behavior, she finds her life mirroring what she despises. 
 
Chance Miller wants to make a difference. After witnessing the death of his parents at a young age, he longs to help others as he was helped. He thought that path was leading him to adopt a child, but he's not sure his heart can take another rejection. 

Then, he saw August. From a distance Chance watched the sweet woman transition into a shadow of her former self. Now, despite her resistance, he feels compelled to step in and pull her back from the precipice of pain and darkness. 

Can August and Chance find a way to help each other put their lives back together? Or are the scattered pieces of their broken hearts shattered beyond repair?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Let's Go For A Pint (Vampire/Humor)
description:
Wattys 2017 winner in The Originals category!!!!
  
This is NOT a romance between the main character and some hunky guy. These are the adventures of vampire Lena as she lives her life from day to day alongside her human flatmate Carmen. Together they encounter human rights activists (not what you think), overly attached exes, vampire geeks, quarrelsome shapeshifters, some really chill people, and a boy band.
      
  Let's Go For A Pint is a satire/genre parody revolving around tropes associated with vampire fiction (mostly tv and film portrayals but written works may be alluded)
  
  Season 1 is up. While marked as complete, expect ongoing editing and bonus content to appear.

I've studied linguistics. No this doesn't mean I'm a polyglot but I do have some knowledge of language and languages and how they work. This also doesn't mean I'm a prescriptivist grammar nazi. Feel free to ask me something if you want to take this in university.

I've taught English in Russia for a short time. Mind you that teaching English as a foreign language is different than English taught in high school/secondary education (bit more focus on the skills than analyzing literature). Don't be surprised if I question the use of something if I read your story.

I don't do exchanges (read for reads, edits for edits) or requests.  If you're interested in what I've put out that's awesome. If I like what you do I'll take a peek. I may break away from this when I have the time but I don't have any at the moment.

Also places other than here that may contain my works are deviantart (an early draft of Laws of Motion). If they appear on any other site other than what I've mentioned chances are it wasn't posted there with my permission.
