authorBio:
BATAYAH is a unique Hebrew name, which means Daughter of Yahweh. Batayah like her name, is a uniquely gifted and talented singer, songwriter, arranger, composer and producer of music; who also loves, has trained and participated and currently participates in many other forms and expressions of art as well.



Beginning at the tender age of four years old, Batayah began singing in live events. Shortly thereafter, at age eight, she was introduced to acting and therefore she began acting in church, school and community plays. She was then noticed and trained to participate in  oratorical events at age ten, which led to many other speaking engagements. At age twelve Batayah was invited to start modeling. Almost immediately, she moved on to runway modeling events, commercials, television and dance shows; however, no matter what form of entertainment she participated in, she always came back to the music and continued to inspire others through music, as music became her overall passion and a part of everything that she would do, going forward.



Batayah began to realize that what she was gifted to do, wasn't simply entertainment; it was healing for the mind, body and soul! Soon after, she began writing and producing soulful songs that truly expressed her powerful gifts and anointing as a singer, songwriter, arranger, composer and producer. In 2009, Batayah opened a Record Label and a Publishing Company, which  have both been in operation for more than thirteen years.



Batayah's Published Projects are available on all platforms and include: "BATAYAH - Daughter of Yahweh", "Simply BATAYAH" and "Soulfully Free". Some of her most popular singles are entitled "WOKE", "LOVE" and "Alive Well & Free". Three of Batayah's most popular Published Spoken Word and Motivational Projects are: "Dedication", "Appreciation" and "Motivation",  and are also available on all platforms. Instagram: @theartistbatayah Facebook: @theartistbatayah Twitter: @ARTISTBATAYAH

title: The King's Choice
description:
A girl oblivious to her surroundings but with a mother who thinks beyond the future, Destiny forcefully drags both Janielle and her mother to the castle.
******
     There comes a point in life when the emergence of a new religion brings Janielle to a point of life and death but the still chooses her.
*******
Read and enjoy the captivating story of the wiles in the life of Janielle
********************************
EXCERPT...
Tyler was in his bath tub with his servants around when Thomas entered.

     "My Lord, I'd like to talk to you", Thomas came in.

     With a wave of the hand from Tyler, all the servants present scurried away.

     Tyler tcched, "turn your back, I want to get dressed"

     Thomas bowed and turned while Tyler came out from the bathtub, dried himself and dressed himself.

     "So?", Tyler asked for Thomas to turn around.

     "Pardon my question, but why are you so interested in Lady Janielle", Thomas asked daringly.

     Tyler smiled, "Is that why you came to stop my bath?", His voice and tone screamed danger but he still had that calm dangerous smile of his on his face. Thomas didn't seem scared though, he was used to Tyler. He just nodded and continued speaking, "Are you planning to make her your consort?"

     "What do you think?", Tyler asked him back.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Elegant Ceo
description:
A heart, as soft as a cloud, goes through so much pain and agony. Any smile that lits up his face later turns into sorrow. He was laughed at, he was mocked and he was tortured. 

But who could blame him, growing up without not knowing what a motherly love was. Living and being raised by a man was all he knew of, but nature seemed to have smiled at him.
 

 This poor little boy has grown to become a handsome, successful man,  making his father the only family that he has and knows of, proud. Thinking that is the best nature could do for him, he was proved wrong by this beautiful woman he encountered. This woman who took his breath away, who sealed the hole in his heart and gave him the happiness he could ever wish for.

But they start going through their own struggles now. Only one fear keeps eating them up. Can they go through this situation together ? At the end of their troubles, would the bond between them still exist? That is a mystery about to be solved

title: Nothing Without You
description:
Life is hard, but you can't complain if your alive, right?

Trinity lives by that motto. Her life is perfect on the outside. She has a nice family. Her parents provide for her. She's president of three clubs, top in her class, and she plays two sports. 

But she can't cry about it, right?

When Warren walks into her life, most of that changes. She learns that being alive doesn't ignore the fact that she's suffering. Warren introduces her to different emotions, ones she never felt before.

Her family decides to give up on her. Her friends walk out of her life. She ends up falling behind in school. Everyone blames her downfall on Warren. To her, she's never been better.

Suddenly, Warren believes that he is only causing harm to Trinity. When he walks out of her life, Trinity has to learn to deal with the new emotions he taught her, the new places he showed her, the new love she has for him.

She has to go through hell to get him back. After all, she's nothing without him.

title: Between Two Worlds
description:
Growing up as a poor first generation oldest daughter of immigrant parents Lucia knows what it's like to be close to her culture and her family. She also knows the pressures that come with it, and has never wanted to disappoint. But as she comes to terms with what she wants to do with her life and who she is; She knows that disappointment is inevitable. 

As the only adopted child of two wonderful mothers, Angela has never felt ashamed or persecuted for her sexuality. But she has always felt a rift between herself and the culture she's desperate to be a part of. After an embarrassing incident at school in regards to her hair, Angela is determined to figure out where exactly she comes from and how to best learn about her culture. 

After a chance meeting their two worlds collide in a whirlwind of romance, self acceptance, and cultural understanding. Despite being so different they might just be exactly what the other needs.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Just a Latinx queer writer trying to be the representation she craves in the media.

I write a lot about love, culture, and sexuality.

title: 𝐅𝐚𝐭𝐚𝐥 𝐀𝐭𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧
description:
"You tell me I'm toxic but you love me that way" 

Venus. The planet of love, fertility, and beauty. Everything that she felt she wasn't. If she was going to be named by a planet, why not Mars or Uranus? 

She felt misaligned, misunderstood, and sometimes alone. Everything around her seemed to be crashing down and she didn't even care to stop it. 

Her journey starts here, learning to love herself, setting boundaries, and finally living up to her name. It's a wild ride and with all the trials and tribulations she was faced with, she never gave up.

title: To Be Loved
description:
Based on a real romance.....

Two young souls find love that one would say will last for all eternity. A love that some would envy. A love that you see in romance movies. A love filled with hopes and dreams; as well as lies, manipulation and insecurities.

Celíne always dreamt about being in the fashion industry and taking over the top fashion magazine that will allow her access to Paris fashion. Yet her support of this dream was non existent. That was until she met Idris and began to truly understand what it meant to be loved. Will this love make it all the way to Paris, or will it burn?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I go by Tay, age will never be disclosed lol. I began writing as a form of closure to certain situations. Now I see it as a way to help others when it comes to love and understanding who they are before fully committing to anything else. Commit to yourself and you'll get the love you deserve. Follow your dreams always and believe in yourself.

Most of my stories for now will be semi-realistic.

title: Bliss
description:
Sabrina's first romance was bliss. He was her everything until he wasn't there anymore. And Sabrina isn't sure she will ever find bliss ever again. 


* * *

After losing her boyfriend to cancer, Sabrina isn't sure that she can continue to live without him. 

Just when all her hope is gone, an unsuspecting Noah saves her from her own demise. But as their relationship progresses, he learns he cannot save her from her own grief. The one thing that haunts her, and something love can't heal. 

_________

title: Triple Effect
description:
Kadence, Camille, and Nurielle have been best friends since birth and each of them had a gift that they were passionate about. For Kadence, it was dancing. For Camille, it was acting. And for Nurielle, it was modeling. Their goal was simple, they wanted to become famous doing what they loved. However, their journey to fame is a whole lot different than what they expected it to be. Along the way, they realize that there may be a bigger purpose for them than fame.

Three girls. Three different dreams. Three powerful impacts.

title: What do the stars feel when they look at Us?
description:
Ben starts to care. About you. About people. About his girlfriend. About feelings and being a person. Growing up. But it's difficult. Seemingly, especially, for him. And he's failing. Miserably. So he's starting to look for answers in the stars. Most of the time rejecting the entirety of his surroundings. Wondering if there are any answers at all. In this wonderful world laid out, bare, in front of him. 

A novel about breast sizes, bad jokes, break-ups and aspirations for betterment. 

Boob. Beeb boob.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, I'm Leon. I'm 22. I just realized I've been creating stories half my life.
Thank you for reading. It makes me feel like my body gets drained of its water and filled with the opportunity to write for a purpose. Which is totally better than having water in your body, right?

title: False Assumptions
description:
After running away from her last foster care Mariah was living on the streets for a few years. She makes a decision that almost lands her in jail but instead she gets taken in by Ms.Valentine the best thing to ever happen to her.
.
.
Chris and his siblings have had a hard life, but one things for certain his mom always made a way. Helping his mom take care of his siblings and working to help pay the bills, he had to step up early but he never complains.
.
.
Chris see's Mariah as a stuck up brat, who's never had to worry about anything in her life. She sees him as an arrogant asshole, who can't admit when he's wrong. After being forced to work together on a project they realize their assumptions are way off.

title: The Eyes of a Fighter: A Serial Novel
description:
NANOWRIMO project 2020. I'm aiming to publish 1600 words each day. Thanks for keeping me motivated!

Gang warfare is taking over the city. The people are hopeless and live in fear. Ed Carter takes it upon himself to clean things up. To do this he must battle his past, join forces with unlikely heroes, and be willing to take on all challengers. 

Ed Carter is the principal of the worst high school in the city. He patrols the hallways, breaking up fights,  sending skipping students back to class, and keeping an eye on his ragtag team of teachers. His battles with booze have left him as run down as his school. 

Jimmy "The Pistol" Henry has hung up his boxing gloves after he lost vision in his right eye in a street fight gone horribly wrong. Now he's reinventing himself as a boxing trainer. He's looking to take on any students he can and set his reputation right. 

When the school board gives Ed Carter an ultimatum: clean up yourself and your school or find a new job, he finds himself at the end of the line. Will Carter find the strength he lost and take his school back?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Dynamic Christmas Love
description:
A Christmas themed Romantic Comedy with a lot of family elements. 

Mary and Lamonte Bangura, a happily married Sierra Leone couple living in Virginia with their two daughters (Ellie and Ashley), 1 son (Tom), and 1 dog (Miguel). They decide to spend Christmas at Times Square, New York. The story follows the lives, emotions, personality, dreams, and conflict each character is facing during the holiday season. Drama and foolishness will follow them this Christmas. But they will manage to make it the best Christmas they have ever experienced.

title: Because I Hate you
description:
Stephanie has always been a popular girl in her school. However, the unfortunate circumstances of the death of her father forces Stephanie and her mother to move to a new city.
Faced with a different culture and definition of 'acceptable behavior', she finds herself shunned aside in school.
Stephanie comes across a kind-hearted person and finally lets her into Stephanie's world. There was even an almost-kind boy who catches her eye. These newly formed friendships will prove to be her main support as she faces the different challenges of life.

title: Web of Gangstas #contemporary lit #urban fiction #street lit #urban #diverse lit
description:
Web of Gangstas  

(Author's note: This title has been changed from Way Too Gifted to In Luv Wit A Gangsta and finally to Web of Gangstas)

 A sort of a coming-of-age tale about a young man trying to find his way in his world. He is young yet experienced but sophisticated. He glides easily through life while being the mastermind of his gang. 

He also uses his supreme knowledge of the streets, book smarts, and charisma to charm his women, beat people at their own game, and cements his place at his throne in modern-day New York. 

He tries to hold on to his title and legacy (king of the streets) until something tragic happens in his life and that forces him to turn his life around.

title: Joy to Joy
description:
When a national strike shuts Nigerian public universities and millions of students return home, where is Joy's brother?

Joy has two parts of the day she never thought could change. Mornings, when She and her flat neighbor Faith would turn the apartment building into a quarrel house, and afternoons, when instead of focusing on her academics, she joins her classmates in making the naïve excellent student's life a living hell.

Her brother Osas says she pushes her insecurities on the poor girl, but Joy prides herself in her self-acclaimed status as a gossip, bully, and mediocre. She would not change that for the world.

That is until she meets Brian, a quiet but calculative boy, who she tutors, but is the one that teaches her a lesson she can never forget.

(Weekly updates)
Tous Droits Réservés

Everyone has a story to tell, even side characters. I write realistic pieces so that there is something for everyone.

title: Sinful Devotion
description:
Israel Taylor had a pretty interesting and conflicting junior year; learning to love never seemed so hard but just when he believes it has happened, he lost it all at the same time. With his first love- Sky - gone, Israel tries to cope with it and even dances around the idea of moving on. After all Lou Martin remains in his life, but then moving on is even harder.

What if Sky really never returns and what if he returns; would Israel be able to love another like he loved him and would Israel be able to fix things up in his life and make him stay? 

The past and the future have never been more entwined.


Disclaimer: This is a Sequel and direct continuation from the first book "If Love Be Sin". You Must Read Book 1 before this, cannot be read as a stand-alone.

title: Salma's Epiphany
description:
When her father dies, Salma feels her world has been blown up by an atomic bomb. She caves into the grief and becomes a shadow of her once bubbly self. Her mother tries all she can to help her grieve 'healthily', but Salma doesn't want any of that. She just wants to shut herself in her room, reliving the memories she shared with her dad. 
But soon, Salma's mom forces her to go back to her school and she reluctantly goes where she's assigned to Rahim as his partner for an English Project. Rahim is the exact opposite of Salma. He's bubbly, energetic and looks as if he hasn't lost anyone in his life! This disgusts Salma and they don't hit it off. 
But as time goes on, Salma recoils from her shell and tries to become friendlier and pursue student politics. However, she's stunned when Rahim betrays her and her fear of losing the person she loves becomes a reality.

title: The Imposter
description:
Love
An intense feeling of deep affection and intimacy. A feeling that is so deep but can be snatched away from you in seconds. A feeling that is meant to be given but can always be cut short.

Imposter
A person who pretends to be someone else to deceive others. An imposter is exactly what Namiya Lucus was. It wasn't what she chose but it was what she accepted. When she comes across Nile Banks, that imposter is burned away leaving ashes to reveal one's true identity.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Hey y'all this is my second account that I will be writing on. The first is the account I read on. I have no problem supporting writers that just started because I know that I am one. My original account is @thereal_augustbaby. Hope you enjoy my writing.

title: Abby
description:
A coming-of-age story about a sixteen-year-old musician named Abby. While experiencing the innocence and fun of her teen years alongside her twin brother, Aaron and best friend, Sierra, Abby encounters the teenage girl's greatest downfall- a charismatic boy. From the moment Abby meets Jace, her life begins to unravel at a sickening pace. This novel explores the dichotomy between love and lust, the toxicity of codependence, and other contemporary themes such as addiction and mental illness. As Abby loses those around her one by one, the reader witnesses a constant struggle with one of life's greatest questions- when is enough, enough.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Sabrina and The Assassin
description:
📍 Charleston City, Arkansas

Sabrina Thomas is 22 and newly graduated from college; up until now, her biggest concern had been job hunting, but now? Helping Charleston City's vigilantes ensure the safety of the city had eclipsed paying back her student loans. Sabrina's new life of assassins, superheroes, secretive organizations, and political intrigue might just get her killed, but maybe she'll find love in the meantime?



© SanaaThe Author, 2024, All Rights Reserved.

title: You Are My Weakness
description:
Kida Salt is a first year university student struggling through regular hospital visits and a demanding degree. 

The hospital has been like a second home to Kida since she was young; it's familiar and unapologetically honest. So when the ball game changes and she suddenly has other people to rely on and other places to be, she hardly knows what to do at all.

And with Drew Abbott swooping into her life, making her feel things she has never felt before, what is a girl to do? 

With boys and bestfriends, parents and siblings all bringing chaos into her life, this savvy, cynical and sophisticated British girl is in for a tough and emotional ride trying to figure herself out once and for all. 

But it doesn't take long for Kida to realise that that's easier said than done. 

How do you decide how to live your life, if it's only when the person you love most is staring death in the face that you feel the most alive?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi!
I'm a student studying in England, and I am writing on here as often as I can in my free time.

I love reading and writing, although writing is a new found joy for me. I'm still figuring out what my favourite genre is so I'll put that here too when I eventually get there.

I also love to watch films and series' - I spend far too much time on Netflix! And I'm always on Wattpad so feel free to interact with my book or message me, I'll reply quickly. :)

title: Say More (Book 2 in "Say" Series)
description:
After narrowly escaping senior year -- and the complicated grips of her first love -- Bridget Montez is now a junior in college, living out all the things she wished for, and vowing to keep her past in the past. Only, she's having a hard time keeping up. Between her demanding school schedule and being the long-distance girlfriend of an NBA prospect, Bridget finds herself stretched thinner than ever and struggling to deal with life in the limelight. But when a massive scandal threatens to tear everything apart Bridget struggles to figure out if the life many dream of is the life she wants. 

As the present becomes too heavy she finds herself reminiscing about the escapes of the past. The things she did. The way she felt. Him. After long she discovers that the past doesn't always stay there. Especially when you refuse to let it.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Yeerrrrrr! That's how we say 'Hi' in Brooklyn, NY. :-)

I wake up at the crack of dawn to turn off my alarm clock and go back to sleep. I'm at least five minutes late to work every day. I barely drink enough water to sustain my life and I'm always forgetting things. 

But when I sit down at my laptop with a blank page on the screen, I leave that scattered part of me and focus in a way that's intoxicating. 

I love stories because I love life. What's more intriguing than telling the stories of life in all its complexity, emotion, and possibility? 

Long story short...writing is dope.

Follow me on Instagram: @athenahernz

Enjoy.

title: Milana
description:
Got it!

"Yes!" I laugh historically. I throw the box in the small trolley next to me, but my foot slips and I'm falling. I can't really do anything to save myself at this point, so I do the only thing I can do. 

Shut my eyes and scream.

"Ahhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh!"

When I think I'm going to hit the ground, I instead land on something. 

Arms. 

I'm in someone's arms.

"What the hell were you thinking?" Something - or more someone - exclaims.

I open my eyes and the glaring face of the boy from earlier is the first thing I see.

"Well hello handsome stranger."
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Blood Wills Woods
description:
Blood Wills Woods, an ancestral landscape passed down through generations of maternal lineage, finally finds its way into the possession of Isana Haemon. Alongside her husband and twin daughters, Willow and Grace, they embark on a new chapter of their lives being the sole owners of the woods. 

However, on the twins' 5th birthday, tragedy strikes when they discover their mother's lifeless body at the heart of those very woods. Since that fateful day, Blood Wills Wood has become a forbidden realm, shrouded in fear, where no one dares to tread.

Determined to leave their haunting memories of their mother behind, Willow & Grace set their sights on graduating high school and escaping the clutches of their traumatic past. Yet, tragedy always looms over the Haemon Sisters as their father succumbs to his own heart condition, thrusting the sister into a daunting journey of survival, now left to protect one another.

The sisters must now come face-to-face with their haunting family history, where supernatural entities possess the ability to control their future, and the irresistible allure of love becomes woven into their fates leaving them powerless to resist its pull. 

⚠️ EDITING ⚠️ 
*feel free to read while I edit: I also don't mind feedback and advice :)*

title: Am I Barry Pyramid?
description:
Two friends from sixth form start to make their own music and start a vanity record label to release the music under a number of different aliases. 	The aliases have little or no image / presence but the label has a name, theme and aesthetic based on David Icke's conspiracy theories that the protagonists hear from their neighbour.	Although the label labours in obscurity it does seem to attract the attention of some unusual characters and the lines between fact and fiction seem to become blurred. Meanwhile every time one of the pair seems on the verge of a creative breakthrough it seems like the other one can't help sabotage it.	When the frustration of faking it gets too much they form a real band but ten years later this new band still hasn't made a record or played a gig.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Jam Factory Records feature the Jam Factory jam jar logo as our guarantee of quality. We use carefully selected bits of other peoples records and sweeten them up in huge steaming vats of burnt sugar for up to 44 weeks so that you don't have to stomach the bitter taste of musical history.

The jam jar label shows Rameses-Piso-Bush, time twisting lizardine inhabitant of the lower fourth dimension and Jam Factory president, proudly displaying the very first jar of Jam Factory jam that will roll off the production line here at the Jam Factory some eighty five years into the future.

Whether we are producing proto punk house albums in the present or delicious fruit conserves in a far flung future you can be sure that if it says Jam Factory on the label it is a Jam Factory jam.

title: Blood Is Thicker
description:
The blood of the covenant is thicker than the water of the womb...

Roneisha Gibson is a young woman navigating the streets of Austin. Businesswoman by day, hustler by night. Under her uncle's supervision and with the help of her cousin Boogie, Roneisha is practically running the city. She's living on top of the world. 

That all changes when a new man comes to town. From the moment Carter stepped foot into her life, Roneisha knew that he would change her world, though she never could've imagined herself falling for him as hard as she did. 

Nothing lasts forever, and Roneisha's happiness is no exception. When she is forced to make a choice between her family and the man she has grown to love, where will her decision leave her?

Keeping her deepest thoughts and desires within the four walls of her bedroom Dahlia was not prepared to be hit with reality the way she was.

authorBio:
Hey WattPals! I'm Halidah, a writer here who loves to spin tales that will make your heart race, your mind soar, and your imagination run wild.

When I'm not lost in the world of my characters, you can find me curled up with a good book or a cup of coffee, dreaming up new plotlines and characters to share with you.

Whether you're a fan of steamy romance, chilling horror, heartwarming coming-of-age stories, or anything in between, I've got you covered. I love to explore different genres and experiment with unique perspectives to keep my readers on their toes.

But what really drives me as a writer is the chance to connect with readers like you. There's nothing quite like the feeling of knowing that my words have resonated with someone, that I've made them laugh, cry, or gasp in surprise.

Also, i'm very much in love - or let's just say OBSESSED with Greek mythology. Big Percy Jackson fan lol.

So if you're ready to dive into a world of adventure, suspense, and maybe even a little bit of magic, join me on Wattpad and let's embark on this journey together! Follow me, and I promise to bring you stories that will keep you coming back for more.

How did i write this long? Boring y'all up!  Forgive me hehe
*sighs in disappointment*

follow me on insta at ehl.writes

love,
halidah.

title: Girls of Forlorn Summer
description:
WE WERE LIARS meets SALTBURN.

The Seymour girls are beautiful and blessed: skin like porcelain, hair kissed by fire's breath and privilege without recompense. They were named fir their parents' mothers. Juliette for their mother's and Josephine for their father's.

I am the last Seymour girl. But I am a bullet shell. A complete outrage of a human being. My entire existence reads like a Shakespearean insult -- clod of wayward marl.

You could say lust is what got me in this mess in the first place. The thrill of wanting something off-limits. And then I burned everything to the ground.

If I'm being honest, you shouldn't read any of this.

I'm serious. Don't.


➤ Open Novella Contest 2024: Prompts #95 and #60

title: The Nostalgic Sin
description:
Life just appears like a too much of complicated symphony, possibly every second. Emerging from a middle-class family, a teenager with diverse catastrophes in life and a battered soul finds her way towards either death or real prosperous existence. Withered and all torn from various aspects she lost the first yearning that was all to her. Now, with mixed feelings, and a profound propensity to perish, the frolicsome teen makes her journey towards what she calls contentment in life. But even now, her fate is deceitful and every path she takes makes better use of her presence.

Dive into a universe full of teen emotions, and how contorted ways every human on Earth conceives life as. Enriched with profoundly duplex sentiments for life, explore Evelyn Grace's roller coaster-like life, in which she endures subtle scandals and treachery from whom she believed love could appear.   

Indeed the sublime journey of 'Life' has too much to offer, but both the sorrows & triumph should be equally balanced, right?

title: Mercy
description:
A Disappearance. A Pole. A Baby. A Brick.

SELAH is just seventeen. Her brother has disappeared, and her mother has taken an interest in... well many other things. Her Journey into adulthood began when she named her little sister something that she would need to call for many times, Mercy. Selah discovers an entire world beyond the neighborhood that neglected her as she claws her way out of the hole that her mother dug for her.

title: Lies and Other Necessities
description:
[Featured on Wattpad Official Romance account]

Everyone has got something to hide. Evie is no different. The romance that bloomed with Matteo Sanders when she was fresh out of college was a whirlwind that she was more than glad to get carried away by.

Months pass and Matteo goes missing-- presumed dead by everyone including his family. Evie is now involved with Logan but her parents, who know just as much about Matteo's disappearance as she does, don't approve of her relationship.

Something happened on that last summer night Evie met Matteo-- something she is sworn to secrecy over, to say nothing but lies and other necessities.

#New adult + #Romance + #Shortstory
Started: 7th August, 2020.
Completed: 21st September, 2020.

Warning: contains mentions of drug use and suicide which may trigger some audiences.

🎖1st place in The Creative Choice Awards [Romance]

title: The Sick List
description:
The cancer is back. And with those words, Frankie's whole world falls apart. She's halfway through eighth grade and now her parents have decided, without asking, to move four hours away so she can receive some experimental treatment. But when she arrives and realizes that no one at her new school knows anything about her, she decides to leave "sick girl" behind and start fresh with a list of all of the amazing things she will accomplish before graduation... as long as cancer doesn't get in the way.

**Aiming to post a chapter a week, fingers crossed.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I love telling and discovering stories. My hope is that my work makes me people laugh and think and, hopefully, want to read more. Excited to be here, sharing with and learning from all of you.

title: Perspectively Perfect
description:
Lucius Lopez is the famous writer who goes by the name, "Lax Lily." His works are recognized for heavy and mesmerising poetical statements as seen from objects. On the other note, he is also a simple college student who doesn't like attention. To get on with his schedule as a famous figure, he hired his cousin, Lewis, to be the face of Lax Lily to go on his interviews and book signing events so he won't have to deal with the crowd. Unfortunately, his plan is being tested when Annatalia Jimenez, a fan of his, coincidentally enrolled to his school and met both of him and his cousin.

Instead of flowery and metaphorical phrases, his life starts to fill up with anxiety and panic statements such as - "What should I do with her?!"

title: Fatal Allure
description:
Faith Richards has always felt out of place in her quiet hometown. Bored, almost. When she moves to the big city for college, she looks forward to experiencing new and exciting things in her newfound freedom. 

Faith meets Darren Matthews, a mysterious guy going through dark changes, and Dante Reid, a man who offers her more freedom and excitement than she could've dreamed of. 

Soon, she realises she's in for a lot more than she bargained for.

Can she keep up with their world, or will its allure prove fatal?

title: A Long Way Back to Troy
description:
In 1973, Jeannie Travis's world was turned upside down by her high school classmate "Truck" Hardy. Jeannie was from the posh side of town; Truck was not. Jeannie had dreams of graduating, attending Mount Holyoke College, and one day teaching children. Truck wasn't sure he would even make it another week of school without flunking out.  Jeannie was into school; Truck was into cars and racing.

Now, forty-five years later, Jeannie is a divorced grandmother who has finally accepted her best friend's invitation to return to their hometown for a high school reunion. With that acceptance, memories of senior year and the way Truck had changed the trajectory--the way he had changed her--come flooding back. But chances that she will ever see Truck again are slim and none. No one seems to know what happened to him after senior year, least of all Jeannie.

But when she returns, she learns that someone has heard from Truck. Will a chance meeting at a high school reunion change Jeannie's life once again? If so, can her heart stand to be broken one more time in her life?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Eva Marie Everson is the bestselling, award-winning author of both fiction. She is the president of Word Weavers International and the director of Florida Christian Writers Conference. Eva Marie has taught as an adjunct professor at Taylor University's creative writing program, served the Jerry B. Jenkins' Christian Writer's Guild for several years as a mentor, and leads practicums and workshops at conferences across the United States.

She and her husband make their home in Central Florida where they are owned by one very beautiful cat.

title: Falling Again || Novella
description:
Opemipo Ademi is not ready to start all over, especially not with Efe in the mix.

All she wants to do is take a break and re-strategize. Going back home isn't what she wants, but she has no choice since she has nowhere to go after losing everything. Especially when her ex, Efe, is involved. She's not ready to bond with family, neither is she prepared to get back with Efe. But the longer she stays, the more she isn't sure her old life is what she wanted all along. 

Maybe all she wanted was a home - after all, home is where the heart is.

title: Somewhere in Between
description:
Beberapa orang mengira bahwa kata "tidak" adalah sesuatu yang kurang sopan dan jarang diutarakan ketika sudah duduk manis dalam kisah cinta. Tapi bagaimana jika kata "tidak" itu sudah menjadi kudapan sehari-hari gadis yang sudah menghabiskan waktu 10 tahunnya di kota Napoli di Italy itu?

Bersama dengan sahabatnya yang bernama Zagi selama 26 tahun, Lina yang mempunyai pandangan bahwa kisah cinta tidak akan selalu berakhir bahagia, bahkan ia juga tidak percaya bahwa cinta bukan hanya pengorbanan. Tapi ia paham dan menempatkan posisinya diantara kedua itu apalagi ketika sosok asing yang tak diduganya itu datang kehidupnya.

Sanggupkah sosok itu mengubah kudapan "tidak" dan gelengan menjadi sepatah kata "ya" dan anggukan manis di kepala Lina?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Even though I cannot have a perfect life, at least I can having a life I want in pages. I would be nowhere without you anonymous reader, I owe it all to you. Lots of love! xx

authorBio:
──── 𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝘽𝙡𝙚𝙚𝙙𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙋𝙤𝙚𝙩𝙨 𝘼𝙨𝙨𝙤𝙘𝙞𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣 ───

Where we celebrate poetic literature in all genres and forms -- be it through poetry, short stories, script writing, play writing, or genre-writing.

𝐕𝐈𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍: To elevate the recognition of poetic storytelling of any form -- alternative storytelling, genre-defined prose, literary prose or poetry.

𝐌𝐈𝐒𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍: To actively engage in scouting and recognizing potentials, educate others about how poetic storytelling works, and actively be interested in pushing the boundaries of writing.

𝐌𝐎𝐓𝐓𝐎: We believe that every voice has a value, and should not just be measured through marketability or profitability. We firmly believe that alternative storytelling like poetry, short stories, literary fiction, script writing and play writing should be held in the same pedestal as that of genre fiction.

──── 𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝘽𝙡𝙚𝙚𝙙𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙋𝙤𝙚𝙩𝙨 𝘼𝙨𝙨𝙤𝙘𝙞𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣 ───

Where we celebrate poetic literature in all genres and forms -- be it through poetry, short stories, script writing, play writing, or genre-writing.

𝐕𝐈𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍: To elevate the recognition of poetic storytelling of any form -- alternative storytelling, genre-defined prose, literary prose or poetry.

𝐌𝐈𝐒𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍: To actively engage in scouting and recognizing potentials, educate others about how poetic storytelling works, and actively be interested in pushing the boundaries of writing.

𝐌𝐎𝐓𝐓𝐎: We believe that every voice has a value, and should not just be measured through marketability or profitability. We firmly believe that alternative storytelling like poetry, short stories, literary fiction, script writing and play writing should be held in the same pedestal as that of genre fiction.

title: The Love Allergy
description:
Francess Jonah is a girl who cannot be around males because when she comes in close contact with them, her allergy immediately starts manifesting itself, she starts sneezing and develops instant itchy rash all over her body. 

She's always wanted to experience love and relationship but she's allergic to boys. 

Theodore Gates has been her crush on campus since forever. 

One day, She decides to overlook her allergy, wears an overall outfit and approaches Theodore. 

She gets rejected by Theodore Gates.

Henry Snows witnesses Francess' rejection.

Henry is different from Francess in every possible way. he hates relationships. ever since his parents split up, he's grown a strong hate for relationships.

After witnessing her rejection, he makes a bet on her with his friends. 

He then approaches her and befriends her.


For Henry, it's just because of a bet. for Francess, she enjoys this newly found friendship.

Unavoidable circumstances erupt that both parties can't escape and feelings start to stir up.

                          ******

Please leave at least a review/ comment or two in the comments section. It will help me learn and improve. Thanks
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Hey Omg readers. Welcome to my world of creativity. I am Omg and I adore creativity. I do hope you love it here 😊. I am still learning when it comes to writing. I'm still in the process of becoming a great writer, I'm working on my improvement. Please always leave a vote on each page of my stories. I do hope you leave at least a comment on my writeups and it's okay to correct me too. I do hope get to connect well through my writeups. Enjoy!

title: Odes to the Erotes
description:
A series of Love poems focusing on understanding and exploring the many different kinds of love.

Focusing first on the seven love gods, the Erotes, then on forms of love in the greek language, and finally in famous romances of the greek gods. 

This is an inherently inclusive anthology, with planned poems on Asexuality, Homosexuality, Demisexuality, Pan/Omnisexuality, and more.

title: To Be Or Not To Be(Currently ON HOLD)
description:
******This is the sequel to SECRETS OF HIS PLAYHOUSE and CAN NOT be read as a stand alone******

After everything he had been through,
After all the hurdles and obstacles,
After everything;
Shawn Philips was finally free.
With millions in his bank account and Philips Holdings and Companies to his name, he has a shot at a new life.
But all he wants is her.

Jermany Dallas is not the same person she used to be.
The past years were not enough to pick up the pieces of her shattered life but, at least she was alive.
Apart from holding down a good job, Jermany is a best selling author and life couldn't be better.
Still, there is a void that fancy apartments and Chanel bags can never feel;
Something is missing, HE is missing.

He's counting on the universe and clinging to faith.
She's tired of playing the twisted game that is life.

Will love be enough to break the barrier?
Or, Will buried secrets and forgotten promises tear them apart once again?

There are only three options;

Give up,
Give in, or
Give it your all

Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
BATAYAH is a unique Hebrew name, which means Daughter of Yahweh. Batayah like her name, is a uniquely gifted and talented singer, songwriter, arranger, composer and producer of music; who also loves, has trained and participated and currently participates in many other forms and expressions of art as well.



Beginning at the tender age of four years old, Batayah began singing in live events. Shortly thereafter, at age eight, she was introduced to acting and therefore she began acting in church, school and community plays. She was then noticed and trained to participate in  oratorical events at age ten, which led to many other speaking engagements. At age twelve Batayah was invited to start modeling. Almost immediately, she moved on to runway modeling events, commercials, television and dance shows; however, no matter what form of entertainment she participated in, she always came back to the music and continued to inspire others through music, as music became her overall passion and a part of everything that she would do, going forward.



Batayah began to realize that what she was gifted to do, wasn't simply entertainment; it was healing for the mind, body and soul! Soon after, she began writing and producing soulful songs that truly expressed her powerful gifts and anointing as a singer, songwriter, arranger, composer and producer. In 2009, Batayah opened a Record Label and a Publishing Company, which  have both been in operation for more than thirteen years.



Batayah's Published Projects are available on all platforms and include: "BATAYAH - Daughter of Yahweh", "Simply BATAYAH" and "Soulfully Free". Some of her most popular singles are entitled "WOKE", "LOVE" and "Alive Well & Free". Three of Batayah's most popular Published Spoken Word and Motivational Projects are: "Dedication", "Appreciation" and "Motivation",  and are also available on all platforms. Instagram: @theartistbatayah Facebook: @theartistbatayah Twitter: @ARTISTBATAYAH

title: Dare: Fake a Boy
description:
Mix cross-continent shifting , wounded people , a crazy dare and Ashmi Chakraborty? You get trouble. 

Ashmi is wounded by the traumatic experience of seeing her parents die in a accident. Always stubborn, she is determined to be strong for others and hide how much pain she is going through. 
When circumstances force her to leave India and go to USA  with her uncle and partner in crime, cousin RJ, her friends come up with a plan to bring back playful Ashmi. 
They dare her to Fake a boy till lunchtime and get a girl to ask Ash on a date.
Challenges and pranks were something Ash could never turn down, so she takes up the challenge. The unexpected happens. Ashmi pulls it off so well that the queen bee of the school, Veronica asks 'him' out.

Ouch! With the whole incident on social media, Veronica's enmity and challenges of the bruised egos of boys, Ashmi has to hold her own and carve out her place. Which would have been easy except for the emotional baggage from the accident. No biggie?
But will the pain she is hiding remain hidden? Will Ashmi let herself go of the guilt which is breaking her?

This is so wholesome I might just cry- @KAI_phantom

A story on self help, the beauty of friendship and the charisma of RJ, Ashmi's cousin. What?! He is a persistent fella,  asked me to add this.......Don't you worry , Ash is on him now.

Trigger Warning : Mild triggers involving accidents, depression, isolation
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Secret Life of a Wattpad Author
description:
In a quaint café, Felicity, a gifted student at Chiton Preparatory Academy, spends her days immersed in books and writing. However, her intellectual pursuits hide a secret: she is a renowned author on Wattpad, with millions of readers and numerous awards for her captivating novels, poetry, and short stories. By night, she crafts her stories in solitude, dreaming of her books hitting the big screen.

Felicity's double life is threatened when a friend discovers her secret identity. As her hidden fame and personal life collide, she must navigate unexpected challenges. Will she keep her secret and rise to become the US bestseller she envisions, or will her world unravel?

This gripping tale explores ambition, secrecy, and the transformative power of storytelling, inviting readers into a world where every click and every word brings Felicity closer to her dream.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
**About the Author:**

Ever since I was a child, I've been weaving stories with my imagination, sharing them with anyone who would listen. The thrill of storytelling that I discovered back then still excites me to this day. While my writing has definitely evolved since those early days, the love for language and creation has never faded.

I've been writing professionally since 2012, and I have no plans of slowing down anytime soon. As a young adult college student, I balance my passion for writing with my obsession for books, coffee, and dogs-especially my service dog, who's my constant companion and inspiration. I write Young Adult Fiction across different genres, pouring my heart into every story I create.

Feel free to reach out if you have any comments, questions, suggestions, or even just want to say hello-I'd love to hear from you!
Novel Series:

The Hunter Werewolf
The Ash Seires
Extraordinary Academy

authorBio:
My pen name is Chauna-lea Tricia Mikien. I'm 35. My birthday is on March 14, 1988. I'm an author, singer, songwriter, designer, & entrepreneur.

I read & write thrillers, mystery, YA, NA, paranormal, urban fic (Contemporary Lit), suspense, horror, etc. I only listen & watch something if it is good. I published an article in a magazine in 2012.

My favorite authors are R.L. Stine, Dana Davidson, J.D. Mason, S.E. Hinton, Lois Duncan, Patricia Cornwell, James Patterson, J.T. Ellison, Joan Lowery Nixon, etc.

title: Kindled Hearts
description:
{Featured @ Wattpad friends and family profile - Celebrating Black History Month reading list (Jan 2023), Featured @ Official Wattpad's Romance profile - new adult romance reading list (May - June 2021), Featured @ Ambassador's Africa, Featured @ writers without borders, Featured @ Wattpad's undiscovered stories (September 2021), Featured on Wattpad's Community Curator list @ Leeleekez, and also Featured on Wattpad's Community Curator List @ -jnicole_, Winner Contemporary Romantics Award @ContemporaryLit}


                                              **********

Two best friends, Kiki Rubiri and Nicole Wanjiru, know just how much blurry and mundane life could get in the streets of Nairobi. But when gusts of wind quake their pitiful selves, in form of new opportunities and of course men, Kiki and Nicole wonder why the painter suddenly decided upon subdued tints?

                 
                                          **********

Nicole could distinctively make out the intonations of her heartbeat. It was no smooth asphalt, nor was it pleasing. It was entirely the opposite. She imagined a rugged chassis and deep-rooted crevices upon a rocky road. A dangerous road trip. She feared that her heart might give out. Her legs already were a noodly pair, holding onto her dress for support.

It was clear that Nicole's mind was a soiled pool of water. It just wasn't functional anymore. Jane Austen would be disappointed, and so would her mother. Nicole was never the forward type of woman. She always thought of herself as demure as a sun's glow right before the full onset of night. Her wanton behavior today was a surprise on her side and she more than willingly blamed it on the cheery night and maybe on the way Wayne's minty breath hit her exposed clavicle like one inclement wind upon feeble branches of a tree.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Candyfloss
description:
"Cora." He called, eyes caressing my face in a way that I so badly wanted for his fingers to instead. "Tell me to stop."

I gulped, the words frozen on the tip of my tongue.

"Cora, tell me now." He repeated, growing more agitated as his gaze moved down to my mouth.

"I can't." I said honestly, shoulders 
dropping in defeat.

That was the only confirmation he needed before he crashed his lips to mine.

***

The story of a girl who's been putting up a wall for as long as she can remember, and a boy who will stop at nothing until he brings it down.

title: Spectacular!
description:
"Smoke and mirrors are for cheap tricks and county fairs, Kenna," he says quietly. "The circus... the circus is where magic and mayhem collide."

Nineteen-year-old Kenna Oberman leads a sheltered life taking care of her sickly mother until she's gifted a ticket to the Continent's most beloved circus-Cyrus Hardgrove's Traveling Menagerie for the Magically Minded and Magnificently Curious. Unbeknownst to Kenna, Cyrus Hardgrove has big plans for her.

As she's swept into the bedazzling world of aerobatics, lion taming, and ventriloquism, Kenna quickly finds herself the star performer of Hardgrove's spectacular show. But is it all just an illusion? 

When Kenna realizes she's trapped, bound to the Ringmaster by a dangerous spell, she turns to the only person not enamored by her spine-chilling gift: Theo Goodborough. The sword swallower hasn't spoken a single word to her since she joined the traveling carnival, but he might be her only chance at freedom.

title: Rich Shit (ON HOLD)
description:
Lay's whole life she's been known for who her parents are. Hood legends who now own dozens of businesses. All she's ever wanted was to have her own identity, to build something without them.

Jr wants to follow in his parents footsteps, take over their businesses one day and grow their empire. Though he doesn't always show it he looks up to them. 

Shit isn't always as easy as it looks tho. Old enemies start to resurface and they find themselves paying for their parents mistakes. Add the old enemies on top of the new ones and shit just gets complicated.

(Jr & Lay are siblings)

--

The book isn't just about Jr and Lay. It's also about their cousins Nini & Demaya:

Nini decided to step up and be a stepmom to her boyfriends daughter Chloe. But she finds herself getting way more than she bargained for. Constant baby mama drama, then a missing boyfriend, shit just keeps getting worse.

Demaya is in an abusive relationship. Feeling trapped she takes it out on whoever's near which is usually family. Unfortunately, when you push everyone away who do you lean on?

.
.
Book 2 of Gang Shit... You don't have to read the first one first one to understand. It's a stand alone, the first book is just their parents lives.

title: Louboutins & Lattes
description:
A BookSocial Series book

~~~

"Because when shit goes sideways we put on our best shoes, caffeinate and keep going."

~~~

Elora Hutchins has it all, except for a social life outside her family unit. In an attempt to find more of a balance, she agrees to put her name into a drawing to attend the movie premiere of one of her online book club's favorite books. Which ultimately leads to planning the girl's trip of a lifetime.

When Elora's world comes crashing down around her a week before she's supposed to leave for her trip though, she tries to cancel, but her friends convince her to go anyway.

The good thing is, it's a girl's only getaway. So swearing off men should be no problem. Until a series of unfortunate events means she keeps running into the same one over and over again. Will she be able to resist the charm of the mysterious Oliver Bellecourt? Or are things about to get more complicated than she ever expected?

~~~

This is a WIP with regular updates for the #Justwriteit challenge.

Warning for mature language and themes. As of now, this book is marked for everyone, if I feel that should change, I will notify readers.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi! Thanks for visiting!

My name is Scarlett, and I'm a chocolate-eating, coffee-drinking, champagne-sipping, and book-reading retired ballerina and writer. (Grammarly also hates me for this sentence.)

I started writing on Wattpad in 2013 for fun and was blown away by the support I received for my poems and Beautifully Broken. After a long break, I returned in the fall of 2022 on a grief journey that led me to finish Beautifully Broken to give Ali the peace she needed and her and Henry the ending they deserved. After wrapping up book one, I'm continuing to explore the stories that take up rent-free space in my head. I've got to admit, I don't mind it one bit.

my works:

- Louboutins & Lattes: The first eight chapters were uploaded as part of the #JustWriteIt Fall Challenge 2024. Full release date TBD.

- Beautifully Broken: All but a few chapters have been removed as of April 2024. The revised version will launch on RADISH FICTION in August 2024.

- Perfectly Imperfect, Beautifully Broken Book Two: WIP. release date TBD.

- Under the Sugar Maple Tree: This was uploaded as part of @NARomance's summer writing challenge, which allowed for a maximum of 19,000 words. Although it was written as a Novelette, I'm currently working to expand it into a full-sized novel. The release date is TBD.

- Another to Catch: Removed March 2024 for rewrite. Release date TBD.

- Poems: I removed my two remaining poems that I wrote in high school. Today, I Went to Heaven was featured on Wattpad's official page under Pocket Poetry after spending 3+ weeks at number one, garnering 50,000 views. It was a great honor and a high note for me here on Wattpad. The part I will never forget is the number of people who messaged me asking if they could read my poem to their high school classmates. Thank you for believing in the power of my words.


As always, happy reading!

Xoxo,
Scarlett
Updated: April, 2024

Find me on my other social media platforms in the link to my Carrd website below!

title: To Be, Rather Than To Seem
description:
[Disclaimer: This book is a first draft and is currently on hold as it's in the process of transitioning to a full novel.]

How many friends do you have? 

When a stray thought forces Will Marte to notice the oddities in his everyday life, what follows is a reflection on the friendly relationships he has and had and a contemplation on the question: what is a friend? 

Having had an unconventional upbringing, he still feels its effects as an adult. Now, everyone around him is aging normally in their conventional life, and he doesn't know how to be rather than to seem. 

                                             ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Published in February 2024 for Open Novella Contest 2024
Copyright © by CrownedMadness (Maddy Alson) 2024

authorBio:
❝ We are all stories, in the end. Just make it a good one, eh? ❞

Maddy Alson is a storyteller attempting to spin the creative fibres into intriguing yarns, hoping to seamlessly weave a tapestry of many-hued images that fascinates your mind─much like this third-person bio I'm attempting... This isn't working, is it? Sigh. This bio thingy is tricky.

Alright, let's try again.

Hey there, Wattpadian! So, you stumbled on my absolute mad profile, accidentally or intentionally. Either way, welcome!

𝐖𝐇𝐀𝐓 𝐀𝐁𝐎𝐔𝐓 𝐌𝐄?

Maddy Alson is a nom de plume. That's a fancy word for not my real name. But, I answer to Maddy or Mads or anything that's somewhat polite.

After graduating from Hogwarts, I've worked multiple jobs, notably as a consulting detective, a Master of Mystic Arts and an esteemed member of Men of Letters. Now I'm a companion of an alien time-traveller by day and a binge-watcher of multiple TV shows and films by night, which you probably figured out by the low-key references.

All jokes apart, I'm a Libran who's inevitably attracted to the calm beauty of nature, art in all forms and good books regardless of genre. And oh, I like writing!

𝐖𝐇𝐀𝐓 𝐃𝐎 𝐈 𝐖𝐑𝐈𝐓𝐄?

I usually express my gratitude personally, but if I fail to reach you... I appreciate every read/vote/comment/follow. Thank you!

title: Employed Epoch Of Alex Brook | Book 1| Humor-Romance (Completed)
description:
"So, let me get this straight. You stomped all over his paperwork?" She started. 

"Not intentionally, but yes," I confirmed it. 

"Threw a drink in his face?" She added. 

"Expensive red wine." I described. 

"Rammed into his car with yours deliberately?" she counted on her third finger. 

"Um...I'm not proud of that one," I said cringing. 

"And called him offensive names?" She ended the list and I winced. 

"Twice." I specified. 

"And you're still alive?" She blinked, looking genuinely surprised. 

"Geez, don't be dramatic or anything..." I frowned at her hyperbolic statement. 

"Maybe he's keeping you around to get revenge." She suggested. Possible. I wouldn't put it past him.

"I didn't know alright!" I exclaimed. 

"Let's hope that excuse is acceptable.." She was merely amused. 

"Working with my new boss is going to be a piece of work." 
                                  **
Synopsis: 
When the CEO of Signature Heights: Jensen Black, and a stubborn employee: Alexandra Brook, clash, it's a battle of wits & a war of perseverance. They are both dead set on making each other's lives hell, but when the story progresses they just might learn that first impressions could be deceiving. As circumstances reveal their true selves and opinions change, things could get complicated especially when suddenly feelings get involved. 

Who would be the first to concede?

Maybe it's not that simple to forgive your archnemesis and maybe it'll result in some hilarious consequences... 
                                 **
Book 1 of a two-part series (completed).High Rankings: # Funny, # Humor, # Comedy, # Romance, #Billionaire

Amazing book, I adore your writing style, and I really enjoyed these characters and story -Reader

Fantastic story, believably flawed characters and deft humour makes for a very engaging read, I could barely put it down to feed my children -Reader

title: The Secretary and Her Boss
description:
Lily Autumns has watched Allie Winters blow up her boss's, life three times. Once when Allie destroyed his company, and bought it for scraps, once when he was accused of attempted murder, and once when Allie broke his heart.

And now Lily is forced to work for the fashion tyrant- Allie Winters, creating an even bigger problem. Allie learning that she is in love with Laurence, her previous boss. And suddenly, Allie has determined it her job to take Lily under her wings and give her a confidence makeover to win the man of her dreams.

Will Laurence finally see Lily as more than just his always trustworthy ex-assistant? Or will Lily get her heart broken in this makeover experiment?

title: Off Script Story | ✔
description:
| FEATURED |

"Do you guys know each other? Great." 

"You both look amazingly charming together."

I gritted, looking at his face as he too made a disapproving face.

We both started at Ramesh sir and Samyukta ma'am. " A masterpiece on-screen couple. Maya and Ajay as Rani and Vicky." They both smiled at each other and that is when I realized my life was doomed. 

*****

Meeting your enemy after 14 years is never a good idea. And when you have to act like a couple, it makes things worse.

Maya Padwal is a rookie entertainment reporter who wants to forget everything related to her dreams of becoming a popular actress in Bollywood. She has only one wish, to move on from her past and make herself capable as a reporter but things don't seem to work out as planned when she gets assigned to take the interview of the handsome rising star, Ajay Sharma. Little did she know then that he was the same neighbour, her childhood enemy.

When fate brings her a sudden offer to act as the lead in a romance film, she finds herself paired with Ajay. Now they need to go through the whole filming process but with the rumours and camera don't lie theory, how will they manage to handle all of it? And what is this new feeling disrupting their lives?

*****

title: A Silent Lover
description:
Jung TaekWoon, otherwise known as Leo of Vixx, is famous for his chic silence in the world of loud and attention seeking idols. Never the most out-spoken person, being around cameras sends his shy personality into overdrive. It's been almost four years since his debut and he's finally beginning to come out of his shell in public, but it's still something he struggles with in his personal life. So when he sees a beautiful foreign girl in his favorite coffee shop, all he can do is look.


Imani Taylor is a woman on a mission and she has a well thought out plan for how her life will go. Step one is expanding her tutoring business into a full scale teaching center. Step two is adopting the little Korean boy who has stolen her heart. And Step three is living happily ever after. Imani is determined to make life work for them in Seoul, and she can't let anything get in her way, even if a darkly handsome man is vying for her attention. 


With TaekWoon just starting to open up to the world, will a love between himself and a woman dedicated to fighting for what she wants be able to succeed? Or will the past come back to haunt them both?

title: FAME
description:
Book One of the FAME Trilogy 

Raya. Michael. Symone. 

Ray, Mikey, and Mo. 

No matter which way you put it, you couldn't say one name without mentioning the other two. Those three names together formed the R&B trio that became a soundtrack to a generation. 

Trinity. 

Once young teenage girls, they were now grown women, who had lived a life others would have only dreamed of. They stood side by side on stages all around the world, entertaining tens to thousands of people each night. They faced the drama, the love, and the hate their lifestyle could bring. 

And now, three years after their final concert, they were all in different places in their lives. But as much as things were different, their status and mark on the industry would never change. They would always be one out of three pieces to a perfect puzzle, watched by the eyes of many, envied, and desired. 

Enter the world of Trinity, and see Symone, Raya, and Michael for who they really are, behind all of the fame and flashing lights.

title: Put to the test
description:
Kairo "King" White is a 25 year old who has taken his fathers lead role after he's just retired is now the kingpin. With a fiancé Kamiya, and a family that he loves and would do anything for them he's put to the test.

An enemy of his father returns to get the throne he thinks he is owed puts their life in a downwards spiral with some devilish tricks up his sleeve.

Will the White family be able to hold their throne down while taking care of their family?



Kamiya Valdez is a 23 year old entrepreneur who never imagined her life to turn out like this. With one of the biggest kingpins as her fiancé you would think that she's happy and has it all. With the past still haunting her she can't seem to find peace.

When a sudden event occurs that puts her between a rock and a hard place she doesn't know if she can take it any more.

Can she handle the pressure that is put on her or will she break?

title: All The Things We Lost ✔
description:
Emily and River meet in Miami, where they have the time of their lives, but it isn't meant to be: the next morning, Emily leaves for San Francisco, leaving both their hearts broken. They don't think they'll ever see each other again.

Emily goes back to the privileged life with her parents. There, a plan is set up for her to marry Jason in order to save the business of both their parents.

River remains in Miami with his little sister, while struggling to provide a living for them both. It is then that he gets the chance of a lifetime, but it means giving up everything he loves.

Then, against all expectations, Emily and River meet again a few months later... On her wedding day with someone else.

*****

authorBio:
My love for stories began before I can even remember. At first, stories were being read to me before I went to bed, then I learned to read myself and would always have a book in my hands. When I was 9, I found out books were written by actual people (it was a big revelation, truly), and I wrote my first story that I submitted for a national contest, which I won too. Now, ten years later, I can officially call myself a Watty winner. My love for writing has not ceased one bit since the first time I found out about the wonderful world of writing, and I hope to be able to share many more stories over the following years on this platform.

title: Cherophobia
description:
"Cherophobia" he said scooting closer.

 "Are you okay? " I asked and shifted further away from him feeling uncomfortable with him sitting next to me.

 "Do you know what it is?" I slightly shook my head at his question. Okay this was getting really weird. I didn't understand what he was saying and here he was still scooting over. 

"It's when a person is often afraid to participate in things characterized as fun or being happy....".

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
When a traumatised young man escapes his family to live with his uncle in another country in hopes of a better life, he finds it.

But not from his therapeutic sessions with his psychologist.

No.

He finds solace and healing from Keturah, the young black lady who has her own battle and scars to heal from. She doesn't know how to do that. 

Heck! both of them don't really know.

Until he comes back for her.

title: Let it Snow!
description:
❄️Featured on @Romance, @adultfiction @StoriesUndiscovered (September 2023), @Newlywrittenbooks, and @WattpadESL❄️

❄️Nora, a young woman not quite content with the direction her life had taken, decides to take a step back and restart from the beginning. 

❄️Leaving her city life behind, and turning a deaf ear to the advice of her very unsupportive and never-happy-with-her family (a stepmother, and two older stepsisters), she comes to live into a small, medieval spa town, where she inherited a tiny cottage set on a castle grounds. 

❄️She only hopes to find a job, possibly as a guide in the wonderful castle she loves, to be able to make ends meet... However, she finds much more than that, waiting for her here-- a new life, entirely different from her previous one, happy memories of her childhood and teenage years, friendship, and maybe love.

❄️But, nothing is as easy as it may sound, especially not figuring out Martin, the charming veterinarian, Nora's new friend, who acts as if they knew each other from the beginning of times, a man shrouded in mysteries of everyday life.
      
       ❄️❄️❄️❄️❄️❄️❄️

❄️A chistmassy winter romance,❄including themes of several of my favourite classics--❄Cinderella, Jane Eyre, The Little Prince❄-- set around a castle❄️

❄A story about a new beginning❄and finding love in the process❄

title: All or Nothing (Urban) Book 9 | The Sideline Series
description:
After inheriting every last dime from his wealthy Grandfather, Theodore Reed has a lot to handle at such a young age. He's picked up and moved his family out to Atlanta so he can start his career as the Prince of the South and raise his daughter in a better environment. From girls, to cars, clothes and a steady income from his clubs and the family business, what could possibly go wrong in Atlanta? When those closest to him devise a plan to take down Theodore and the lucrative family business, will Theodore be able to handle his new responsibilities or will he crack under pressure?

title: Kiss Me Twice ✔︎
description:
As an exchange student from Scotland, a whole new world opens up to Darren Green when he moves to the United States. He'll live with a host family, start at a new school, and he'll have to make new friends. However, what won't be a part of this new life is love. Love is nothing but the attribution of physiological arousal to attraction, and it distracts him from what he should be focusing on: getting into Princeton. So, when a kiss cam forces him to kiss a stranger, and that stranger kisses him twice, he goes along, but only for the sake of exploring this new American life.

However, he can't help but get caught up in the life of this mysterious stranger named Dakota. As he navigates life in the States, he keeps finding himself close to her, going on adventures he'd never dared to dream of. However, he convinces himself it isn't love. It's just friendship -- friendship that started with a kiss.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My love for stories began before I can even remember. At first, stories were being read to me before I went to bed, then I learned to read myself and would always have a book in my hands. When I was 9, I found out books were written by actual people (it was a big revelation, truly), and I wrote my first story that I submitted for a national contest, which I won too. Now, ten years later, I can officially call myself a Watty winner. My love for writing has not ceased one bit since the first time I found out about the wonderful world of writing, and I hope to be able to share many more stories over the following years on this platform.

ENG & NL

title: Dark And Light (Bwwm)
description:
"Joy." He calls out to me. I can feel the way he craves my attention to be drawn on him. So I do exactly the opposite and turn away.

"Joy!" He speaks again this time with much more authority it shook the walls of the room. I stop dead in my tracks and wait for him to speak.

"Turn around love and come back over to me." 

Out of defiance again I keep walking hoping to get further but that didn't last long as he speeds right in front of me.

Slowly looking up his body I analyze the long, jagged spikes protruding out his back. I look down at his arm which is such a deep navy color that it almost looks black along with his slender fingers that have pointy, white claws that he gently wrapped around my throat.

I rolled my eyes at his antics sighing soflty. His almost 8 foot frame looks down on me smiling with his just as razor sharp teeth.

"Now why are you trying to leave me Joy? We both know you can't. I can feel your desire for me love. I know you want to stay." He says with playfulness behind his words.
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
The world is no longer without supernatural abilities. A deadly virus spread rapidly across the Earth causing people to get infected left to right. But all hope is cured when a vaccine is available for the taking. Although, said vaccine did leave quite the side effects.

title: Behind Closed Doors
description:
What would you do if you were a homosexual in a country where being gay is severely frowned upon and considered a taboo? What is the ultimate price to pay if you were different, gay?

Lagos playboy, son of an ex-beauty Queen; and sole heir to the Johnson fortune, Henry Johnson, is facing a stunning controversy because of his sexual orientation . . . He loves men, yet the thought disgusts him and throws him into turmoil, that is, until he encounters Phoenix, a bisexual male stripper and prostitute who is wildly ambitious and will do anything to climb the social ladder. Phoenix is the one man that opens his eyes to the taste of the forbidden fruit, to what it feels like to hold another man, to kiss another man, and to bed another man.

One taste of the forbidden gay fruit and Henry knows he's trapped. Trapped between Society's expectations, his duty to his family, and his hidden love of men. Set against the backdrop of a sprawling, decadent Lagos City, and from there to the outer edges of Eastern Nigeria, where being gay is unimaginable, a gay romance unthinkable, the consequences of being caught frighteningly debilitating and cripplingly suicidal, Behind Closed Doors is a story of hidden passions that take hold in the dark where same sex love thrives.

Henry will be forced to look deep within himself to unearth the man beneath, to make the toughest decisions of his life as it concerns Phoenix, a young man whose destiny becomes irremovably entwined in his. He will have to question everything he holds dear, everything Society has taught him. He will be forced to question his very existence.

Behind Closed Doors is the debut novel from one of Nigeria's rising voices in Fiction, Kingsley Adrian Banks.

Word count: 96,000 words.

Trigger: Violence. Homophobia. Emotional pain.

This novel is 100% gay. If you like it, then read it, comment, vote on it.

Furthermore, please search for it and add it on Goodreads. Thanks!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Kingsley Adrian Banks, born 3rd April, 1993, is a Nigerian Novelist, Podcaster and blogger.

In May, 2020 he published his  debut novel titled Behind Closed Doors, which is one of the few Nigerian novels that fully tackle gender stereotypes, sexuality, and being gay in Nigeria. It's also the very first Nigerian novel with a feminine presenting male main character. Behind Closed Doors is available as a serial on Wattpad. It is also available on Amazon, B&N, Bambooks, Okadabooks, Book Depository and Kobo.


His latest novel is titled Adamma, the first book in the Women of Eternity trilogy of novels and is available on Amazon here:

https://www.amazon.com/dp/B08QZ4F5MY?ref_=pe_3052080_276849420

Banks operates a personal literary blog here:

title: D*ck the Halls (18+)
description:
Emma Campbell was just trying to get out of the house. After spending the day with her holly-jolly mother, she needed to decompress and *drink*.

Then, Seth Phillips walked in.

Cocky, persistent and infuriatingly brilliant, Seth had been her childhood nemesis, the rival who'd irritated her all the way from elementary through high school.

But, he hadn't had that jawline then. 

Or those broad shoulders.

Or that *perfect* ass...

After a moment of weakness (well, more like three, but who's counting) Emma has to survive the holidays, navigate familial obligations, and stay away from the maddening man that she can't seem to resist.

Fa-la-la-la-la, la-la-la-la

♥　♡　♥　♡　♥　♡　♥　♡　♥　♡　♥　♡　♥　♡　♥　♡　♥　♡　♥

title: What's Best For Me (Mature)
description:
This is the third book in the "Unapologetically Me" series. If you haven't read "Unapologetically Me" and "A Silenced Gift" please don't read this story until you've read them. This is a spin-off following one of Fatima's best friends, Chanel Henderson, on her journey to find "what's best for her." 

For Chanel, meeting Trey Songz was initially only supposed to be a fantasy. However, all of that changed from the moment they first laid eyes on each other. What was supposed to be the fulfillment of only one night of pleasure, turned into something more and at the same time nothing at all. And it lasted longer than either believed it would. While watching her two best friends, Fatima Ward and Autumn Allen, move on in more serious relationships, she decides that it's time she give being in a relationship a try. As much as she wishes it could be with Trey, she knows Trey can't give her more. What started between them was based on sex, it was never meant to be anything more but "fun." She tries to move on and find love with a "normal guy," but everywhere she turns, Trey is there. Will she follow her heart or do what makes the most sense?

title: The Truth About The Many Worlds Of Printed Pages
description:
Weekly updates (Wednesdays/Thursdays)

°•○•°•○•°

Once they all quieted down, the old woman spoke to Siena and James. "Let us direct this argument a little more towards philosophy. Think of our many worlds, as possible worlds. Possible fictional worlds, existing in those books you love to read. What if every single one of those imaginary worlds is real? And what if you two, working together, might have a chance to change them? To create happier lives for many, many unfortunate and tragic characters? It would not change the books for the readers in our world, you don't have to worry about that. You would only make their lives better in their own universes."

°•○•°•○•°

Siena, a young Italian teacher with a dream of working in the Uffizi Gallery.

James, a Scottish journalist and inventor working on his book about the Lochness Monster.

They have nothing in common, nothing apart from their love of books.

However, once they are brought together by the mysterious Bibliophile Society, they find it very hard to stay apart.

°•○•°•○•°

"So many worlds, so much to do... " James mumbled distractedly as he and Siena finally followed George towards the front door.

"...so little done, such things to be. That's Alfred, Lord Tennyson," Siena finished for him as George opened the front door for them.

°•○•°•○•°

This is a contemporary, urban fantasy romance that will transport you into the worlds of books (those in public domain, for copyright reasons).

title: The Witches on BellaRow Street
description:
Four African-American Witches on the run from a Warlock detective, a jilted lover, and a ridiculous super clingy cat named Mister Purr. 
                                                    ***

Hey, If you're reading this, my sisters and I are on the run. What started out as a night of celebration quickly turned into chaos. 

Anyway, we left a few people behind and we're feeling bad about it, but when you're on the run, who has time for goodbyes, am I right?! Lol (bad joke). 

Unfortunately, we left our super clingy cat, Mister Purr behind as well. So, if you see him, DO NOT tell him where we are. Thanks!

Wish us luck,
-Yanni, Junie, Faylayee, & Aunt BeeBee
 

***Book Contains: Fierce Women, intimate love scenes, dark humor, and colorful language.***

title: A Kind of Magic
description:
~ONC 2024 Honourable Mention~
                   ~~~
Alaric, the King of Silmarea, recently married to his beloved husband, needs an heir of his own blood to secure the throne.

With the help of Emrys, his court magician and best friend, he recalls his youthful escapades and discovers a daughter he once had with a woman he had loved in The World Beyond The Stones (our world).

He sends an unlikely but trusted trio on a quest to find her and bring her home-- a brooding dragon shifter and Highlander who owes him a favor, a dashing elf whom he loves like the son he never had, and a loyal, kindhearted dwarf, the elf's best friend.

Alaric, the last scion of the old gods, weary of ruling the country and ready to retire and enjoy his love life, doesn't know that this quest will bring much more than he ever bargained for, setting in motion events plotted by the destiny that will challenge his kingdom and legacy.

                   ~~~

My ONC 2024 entry inspired by prompt 21: A dragon, an elf, and a dwarf embark on a quest to find the lost heir to the kingdom.
