title: Female Gaze
description:
Brie Sheridan has had her heart broken way too many times. Rhett Price is usually the culprit, but, this time, he might be the solution.

                                                                  	*****
Brooke 'Brie' Sheridan wouldn't necessarily call herself a hopeless romantic; after all, love is everywhere if you choose to look for it, and there's nothing wrong with wanting to see the beauty and the good in the world. However, her rose-colored lenses are shattered when her boyfriend dumps her right at the start of her final year of college, ruining all her plans for her senior project, and here lie Brie's hopes, dreams, and pieces of her broken heart.

Enter Rhett Price--known commitment-phobe, the bane of Brie's existence, and the reason behind many of her late-night crying sessions during the harshest days of high school. Down on his luck and struggling with improving his reputation, he turns to Brie in a time of need--he'll help her out with her project, and she'll help him look better and more responsible in the eyes of his family.

Old feelings resurface, and it quickly becomes obvious there are certain things you don't always get over. Your first love might as well be one of them. 

                                                                  	*****
BENNINGTON UNIVERSITY SERIES #1

[[4X WATTPAD FEATURED STORY]]

title: Allyson In Between ✔︎
description:
|| WATTYS 2021 SHORTLIST || Hindsight isn't always twenty-twenty. A head injury has left a critical gap in seventeen-year-old Allyson's memory, so she barely recognizes her little sister, Lindsay, who's grown sullen and antisocial. What happened to the silly and fun girl who used to call Allyson her best friend?   

The answer starts to take shape when Allyson unlocks an instant messaging app and delves into the archived conversations. The more she learns about the person she was before her accident, the more she wants to stop reading. She's ashamed of the way she treated Lindsay, but despite her efforts to reconcile, Lindsay remains distant. She seems to be harboring some terrible secret herself. 

Allyson needs help to solve the mystery, but she's afraid to challenge her parents' fragile pretense of normality. And Noah, the boy Allyson doesn't remember falling for the first time, is reluctant to dig up the past. Her only choice is to find the courage to meet her former BFF-a stranger who knows all the unsavory details. Allyson will have to own her lies and accept one heartbreaking truth if she's going to keep her family from falling apart.

|Cover design by Phillip Hilliker: www.philhilliker.com. Illustration from postermywall.|

description:
𝐒𝐓𝐑𝐈𝐍𝐆𝐒 #𝟏

Tarangini's goal is to take over her father's company and make her sister the CEO of it. Taravy construction, and stop her father, from making anymore marriage business alliance which can lead to ruining her daughter and sister's life, like it did to her. 

Perhaps snatch away the only chance to fall in love, and have a happily ever after forever.

Like she hoped for, to insure this she made the only sane deal with Madhu Singhania her late mother's best friend and the mother to only person, she ever loved.

Sarvin Singhania the CEO of SINGHANIA GROUP OF COMPANIES and a father.6 months into marriage and he was Divorced, no one knows what happened, not even the cockroach in the house, only the close once does.

The real conflicts arise, when the strings of marriage knot tied to him, without taking a second thought of what if he became the problem itself, she said yes.

At first, he hated her not knowing who she is, but when he did, he tried to mend the broken pieces of her unhealed heart along with his own. Will he be lucky to catch the second chance tightly, when life gives it to him?

Or it will end in vain like last time it did?

He was broken hearted, rude, egoistic, sassy and sucker of cigarette until he become a sucker for her. Even if he was all along. The way to a softy again he did some things causing the second conflicts to arise and making his work in vain.

Tarangini's plan and the urge to stand still on the other side of wall without peaking from the high walls of her heart for just a one glance at him, goes in vain when he climbed it, to protect her heart from broken again and make her one of the greatest secrets hidden under the wrap. 

She would do anything, even if it takes to hurt him and go with the plan to divorce him as soon as the contracts end, once she get what she wants.

Until then her heart will be on stakes.
And He will be her smoke.

Loose lips sink ships, but silence guards the most dangerous shit.
-

description:
After a tragedy, Amila Johnson abandons her life in New York and retreats back to her birthplace of Houston. She tries to start anew but she can't get far with the skills of being an almost classically trained ballerina. 

Deciding to take up her friend's offer to pick up a few shifts at a coffee shop, she becomes reacquainted with a person from her past.  He wants to help her but values his privacy and she doesn't like handouts. 

So, they formulate a contractual agreement. An agreement that's pleasurable for them both but will feelings get in the way of this act of ink and lust or will things stay professional. 

Luxury and sex; what's more to want?

title: Not a Bestseller
description:
Ben never wanted to write a book. Being autistic, troubled, and the fourth child? It just doesn't sound like a very interesting story. That doesn't stop his therapist, Dr. White, from giving Ben a blank journal. And when Dr. White's mysterious (and slightly annoying) daughter, Julia White, blackmails Ben into joining the therapy program, Ben finds he has no choice but to testify.  

So, he starts at the beginning: the day he stole a water bottle. From there, it only seems right to discuss his entrance into the group therapy program, his obsession with chocolate chip waffles, and the ever-crippled relationships with his parents and brothers. As Ben navigates his own life and works tirelessly to get himself out of therapy, self-discovery backfires in the worst way imaginable: he may not want to leave.  

Not a Bestseller is a YA contemporary absurdist novel about a young boy burdened by society's labels. In a Great Gatsby meets Wimpy Kid style, it tackles its story head-on with healthy doses of sarcasm and a lot of love.

Now Available in Print! 

Link to Purchase: https://www.amazon.com/dp/1668597543


*Please note that this book has a heavy focus on mental health and will be discussing some sensitive issues*

title: Entropy
description:
South african based story.

THATO Mokoena is an ordinary girl.





Sike.


This is not that type of book.


Do you want drama, suspense, comedy, tragedy, and heartbreak in one book.

Well you've come to the right place

This is a story where the protagonist is both female also her own heroine. 

Certain circumstances have forced Thato to join the Gentlemen Club, an exclusive ring made up of arrogant and wealthy men who are extremely against feminism and woman being in charge. 

How is Thato in this association you ask? 

Well for one, she doesn't take no for an answer and sure as hell gets what she wants. 

She went from being the girl who used to transport the "product", to girl who runs  the whole drug operation. 

Thato Mokoena is not the one to mess with. But will the power go straight to her head, or will she remember the reason she joined the club in the first place?

That is the question.

title: 𝐀 𝐋 𝐋 𝐔 𝐑 𝐄
description:
--𝘼 𝙇 𝙇 𝙐 𝙍 𝙀 



"You don't even know me to be able to expect anything" 

"you right lil ma" He said letting out a slight chuckle " I guess will have to change that huh" He  looked down at me with a raised brow. 

"How will we change that sir?" I asked already knowing the answer to this but I decided to act clueless.

"By giving me your number goofy" He said with a "duh" tone the smirk never leaving his face as he took another sip from his cup.

title: Only You
description:
18 year old, Anari Smith, lives in a not so safe area of Detroit. She lives with her mother, Diamond, her father, Antonio, and her little sister, Alexis. Anari's parents are always gone. Antonio is a pilot and Diamond is a Flight Attendant. Anari basically takes care of her little sister. Lately, her parents have been gone on more trips and haven't been leaving money for them. Anari is really struggling with the little money she has left. All of her parents family live in Atlanta, so she has no other people to ask for help. She honestly doesn't even want help. She wants to be independent, but her bestfriend won't allow that. There is one more month before Anari has to start her senior year in high school. She has to get a job so she can buy everything Alexis needs to start school, pay bills, keep food in the house, and save up to buy a car.

What happens when one person comes in her life and changes it for the better?

title: All She Can Take
description:
Sidney Berry had her life planned out: after high school go to culinary school, become a world-renowned chef and marry her childhood sweetheart, Aiden. But after a tragic incident that shakes her world at the end of her senior year, her plans derail and she ends up a twenty-three-year-old struggling single mother living in her childhood neighborhood in Brooklyn, NY. 

But just as Sid is barely keeping her head above water, she meets Phil, a low-level dealer with a big mouth and a thing for her. With him comes an opportunity to get herself out of her most recent financial bind, all she has to do is take something that does not belong to her. Sid has to decide whether to take the high road and remain in her mess or take all she can to get back everything she lost.

✨COMPLETE✨
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Yeerrrrrr! That's how we say 'Hi' in Brooklyn, NY. :-)

I wake up at the crack of dawn to turn off my alarm clock and go back to sleep. I'm at least five minutes late to work every day. I barely drink enough water to sustain my life and I'm always forgetting things. 

But when I sit down at my laptop with a blank page on the screen, I leave that scattered part of me and focus in a way that's intoxicating. 

I love stories because I love life. What's more intriguing than telling the stories of life in all its complexity, emotion, and possibility? 

Long story short...writing is dope.

Follow me on Instagram: @athenahernz

Enjoy.

title: Just for Tonight (2021 Watty's Winner)
description:
Scarlett and Nate are the epitome of "right person, wrong time", and two years after their one night together, Scarlett sees him interviewing for his album about the night they met in order to find her, and she finds herself taking the chance she didn't two years ago.

						*****

When Scarlett's dad dies during her senior year of college, all she wants is to be someone else for one night. When she meets a mysterious boy, that seems entirely possible. They both agree that for the next few hours, they're 'Quinn' and 'Mason'. But to truly let go and not worry about their futures, they vow to never see each other again. Two years later, Scarlett owns a bakery in New York City and is living her dream. But despite all of this, she's never been able to let 'Mason' go, and a part of her regrets their vow to never see each other again. So, when she sees 'Mason', who turns out to be the up-and-coming singer Nate Cameron, on her television interviewing for his debut album "Quinn", with songs about the night they met, she knows she has to take the chance she didn't take two years ago.

Watty's Romance Winner 2021
Being published by W by Wattpad Books

Book One of the "Just For" Series.
Approximately 80k words

title: Hold a Ghost
description:
Paige de Haan believes in a lot of things, but ghosts aren't one of them. Keane Mahoney would just like her to believe in herself.

                                                                  	*****
After a devastating summer, Paige De Haan is determined to cut ties with her old life--no more parties, no more attention, and definitely no more old friends. Her plan seems to be working until an unexpected run-in with her former best friend, Keane Mahoney, throws a wrench in her plans.

The universe pushes them together, forcing them to partner up for their senior project: a ghost-hunting web series where skeptic meets believer. The sudden closeness stirs up unresolved feelings and urges them to confront the past they've been avoiding.

Now, Paige and Keane must decide if their relationship is destined to stay buried . . . or be brought back to life.

title: College Life Of A Pampered Princess
description:
Isla Kensington has never had to struggle a day in her life. Born to wealthy, successful parents in Beverly Hills, she's always been cherished, protected, and given the freedom to follow every whim.

Now stepping into college life, Isla is determined to keep her independence while navigating the world on her terms. She has big dreams and a meticulously planned path ahead, but life has a way of shaking up even the best-laid plans. Her perfectly ordered life takes an unexpected turn when a face from her past -  Reid Carter - crashes back into her life in the most surprising way.

*********************************************

Reid Carter has always had the play-boy image follow him everywhere, even to college. He hates commitment because he believes it's nothing more than a fairytale and fears ending up like his parents, who were once celebrated for their love and now couldn't stand to be in the same room together. 

When Isla star Kensington comes crashing into his life with her perfectly planned life. What started as curiosity, dragged out to something more profound. 

What will come out of this unlikely pairing? Find out by swiping below.............

title: Unapologetically Me
description:
Fatima Ward is a pre-med senior at Hampton University. Becoming a pediatric doctor is her parent's dream for her, but secretly Fatima wants to be a Fiction Writer. She finds herself fulfilling this secret passion by writing fanfics on the extremely popular online writing website, WriteNow. To keep her identity private, Fatima writes under the pseudonym @YaraTheWriter.  With over 30,000 followers, Fatima's books are successful within the WriteNow community.  

Curvy and proud, Fatima has a long-time boyfriend who goes to school at Norfolk State University. While working on her new fanfic using rapper, Jericho, she finds herself becoming close with a new reader who she later finds out is the man himself. When he shows interest in meeting her she is hesitant but goes through with the meeting anyways.

Jericho was born Jaren Young in Brooklyn, New York. He was known mostly for his basketball skills, but always had a love for poetry that led to rapping as a hobby. When things didn't work out for him at Syracuse University, a chance meeting with music legend Nas led to a record deal and his first album was instantly named a classic by both fans and critics. While working on his follow-up album, he runs across WriteNow and @YaraTheWriter through his assistant. 

What initially starts off as just something fun to pass the time leads to a deeper friendship. Even though he is dating one of America's most beautiful and popular actresses he finds himself anxious to meet the woman behind the book. What will happen when these two finally meet?

**********

title: The Journalist and Her Actor
description:
When Gossip Columnist Em Springs is forced to do a story on the up-and-coming actor Luke Walker, she must go undercover as an actress on his new movie to get the juicy details.

But things quickly get out of hand when she gets promoted to the love interest to the suspicious Luke Walker, who refuses to speak to her whenever the camera isn't rolling, and suddenly their on camera chemistry starts making headlines. Soon Em is sprouting feelings for the hottie actor and making friends with the victims of her past stories. And when someone threatens to reveal her true identity, Em Springs has to act fast. Will she be able to get the story and get out without becoming her own headline or will she get her heart broken when she inevitably is found out?

title: Spotlight
description:
When superstar Kade Hendrix steals Ivy's song, she falls into his world of public scrutiny-and his arms-just as the rest of her world falls down around her.

Ivy is sure superstar Kade Hendrix won't notice his number one fan in the crowd of his intimate concert, but what happens when her childhood idol begins singing one of her songs that she submitted for his consideration--and pretends that he was the one who wrote it...

There's a reason they say never meet your heroes. 

                                                    ***

Ivy Bennett is just trying to get over her crush on her off-limits guy best friend when she is forced into superstar Kade Hendrix's world of managers, publicists, stylists, Non-Disclosure Agreements and intrusive paparazzi--all because he decided to steal the songwriting credits to what is proving to be his biggest hit of all time. 

Coaxed into a flimsy alliance where she takes a job as his primary co-writer, Ivy and Kade are caught up in a whirlwind of emotions--most of them hate--but somewhere along the way, romantic lines are blurred and Ivy isn't too sure that crush she had on Kade ever really went away.

Will Ivy forgive and forget the terrible behavior of the one person who was her inspiration for writing in the first place, or have the bridges already been burned?

Follow Ivy and Kade on their journey from strangers to enemies to something neither of them can put into words in his world of extremes in the spotlight.

title: Hate to Love You - An Enemies-to-Lovers Christmas Romance
description:
Julia has always prided herself on her independence, steering clear of serious relationships to avoid losing her sense of self. But when she's asked to help plan her best friend Penny's Christmas Eve wedding, Julia is forced to work with the last person she wants to be around: Kyle. He's arrogant, insufferable, and worst of all, she's convinced he's planning to ruin the wedding out of spite.

Kyle may have left Penny at the altar, but it's her rejection afterward that still stings. What's worse is how quickly she moved on with his brother, Chase. Feeling betrayed, Kyle's only reason for getting involved in their wedding plans is to prove he doesn't care-and maybe to settle a score with Julia, who he blames for pushing Penny into Chase's arms. But as sparks fly and tensions rise, Kyle realises his anger might not be the only thing drawing him toward her.

NOTE - An enemies-to-lovers romance, that follows on from Penny and Chase's romance in the novella, 'Chasing You'. Although 'Hate to Love you' can also be read as a standalone story.

title: Undercurrent
description:
Raven Collins has an enemy: her best friend's twin brother. The only problem? That very same twin brother blames Raven for his twin's death, as well as the rest of her town. 

While she struggles to uncover the truth surrounding Adam's mysterious drowning, she also has to fend off budding feelings for her high school tormentor, but when he decides to join her in the hunt for answers, their connection becomes all the more real. 

While the romantic lines become blurred and they are faced with more questions than answers, can Raven control her heart long enough to find out the truth of what really happened to her best friend, or will she be consumed with the undercurrent that threatens to drag her, and everyone else, down right along with her drowned best friend?

Trigger Warning:  mild language, mild sexual content.

title: The Lonely Girl
description:
When Cami moves in with the 2 most popular guys in school in a new foster home placement, she realizes that her tragic past just might make it so that she will stay lonely forever.

                                                        ***

Cami has been lonely since her life was destroyed five years ago and she ended up in foster care, bouncing around from house to house with no set direction--until she ends up at Hartingrove Academy, where she meets the enigmatic player Colton, and his best friend, golden boy football star Parker. 

The boy's feud threatens to make Cami collateral damage as she finds an unlikely ally in the outcast brother of her crush--Grey Hartingrove--who just might have even more demons than her. 

But when her home placement is changed and she finds herself living in Grey and Parker's house, the lines of romance become even more blurred.

Faced with insurmountable obstacles in her home and social life, Cami realizes that, in the end, she might just be truly alone after all.

title: The Bartender's Guide To The Galaxy
description:
With a new master's degree in hand, a sassy bartender navigates the perils of her family's bar business as she tries to escape her dysfunctional life.
                                                                      *****
Growing up under a neon bar sign with minimal parental supervision imbued JUNE CASHMERE with plenty of moxie. Raised by a narcissistic mother and a drug-dealing dad who stole her car and went on the lam, June has worked her way through college as a bartender in her parents' bar. She has a weakness for one-night-stands and a gift for reading a customer's taste before their butt hits the barstool, a fine skill by anyone's measure. 

Just days before snagging her master's degree and her ticket to freedom, June meets CABE FRANKLIN, a hazel-eyed hottie with humor and a surprisingly level head. He's in town long enough to make a business deal, and he doesn't leave until June is properly intrigued. 

But June's future plans go south when her mom decides to bail on the bar biz, dropping a load of legal problems in June's lap. Cabe, who happens to be in the real estate biz, helps June find her missing father so she can sell the bar, which happens to sit on a prime piece of beach property. Is their hook-up destiny? Or is it a cheap shot?

The Bartender's Guide To The Galaxy follows the sexploits of an independent woman as she navigates everything the universe throws at her, including egos the size of Jupiter.

COPYRIGHT NOTICE: This work is owned by the author. Please do not attempt to plagiarize or a meteor might land on your house. IN OTHER WORDS: If you find this story on any online platform other than WATTPAD, I did not allow this. You may also be exposing yourself to malware. If you wish to read this story in its original, safe form, do it here on WATTPAD.

authorBio:
WELCOME to my virtual home. Pull up a seat and let's chat. Too shy? Okay, I'll start...

WHO - IRL I'm a city gal, a mom, and a wife to a nerdy video game developer. On Wattpad, I'm a Watty winner and a Wattpad Originals writer.

👉NEWS: My novel, A Goddess Unraveled, will be available through W by Wattpad Books on May 13, 2025. Pre-order on Amazon! https://tinyurl.com/4e93a6s5

WHAT - I write romance and its various subgenres, but romantasy is my fav because sexy guys with wings are a turn on even if the covers are cliché.

I'm a former Engagement Ambassador
I co-lead @bootcampmentors

Enjoy YA? You'll find more of my works @buzzmama, including Wattys winner Neon Girl.

WHERE - I was raised in Las Vegas under the lax supervision of musician parents before I set down roots in Florida.

WHEN - My exact carbon dating is a trade secret, but it was a great time to live in Vegas because Elvis was still alive and I got to meet famous people before their reputations tanked.

                  FREAKY FACTS about me:
* I started wearing glasses as soon as I started to crawl (apparently I hit a lot of walls)
* I suffer from katsaridaphobia (fear of cockroaches)
* I've never broken a bone, but I've been hit by a car
* I spent a week at a Buddhist monastery
* I can name the actors in movies I've never seen
* I would rather be denied food than music

I LOVE to hear from MY READERS! If you've enjoyed a story, post your comment after THE END. Or post it on my profile page. I make an effort to reply to all of my shout-outs.

PLEASE DO NOT ADVERTISE YOUR STORIES HERE. I DO NOT TAKE READ REQUESTS.

title: To Infinity and Beyond

The pages of this story will entail the tale of
- a brave-heart guy who sacrificed his love
- a modern day maiden who is bold and impulsive
- destiny's play to make them their cross paths, and
- a past tragedy that will muddle their hearts

You are going to join Mark and Alice in their journey of passion, endurance and unconditional love to infinity and beyond.

                                                  ***

Mark is a twenty nine year old corporate lawyer based in New York, who is single and heartbroken after the girl he loved married his boss. Unlucky in love and weighed down by a nerve-wrecking tragedy of past, he builds walls of solitude around him, reluctant to fall for anyone again.

Alice is a twenty six year old psychiatrist based in Vancouver, and is running from a grave mistake that almost destroyed her life. She starts afresh in New York and by a twist of fate meets Mark.

Will they find the heart to love selflessly and sacrifice all they have to be with each other?
or
Will their past haunt them most unexpectedly and flood their lives with hurt and pain again?

There is only one way to find out ❤️

title: The Downside to Perfection ✔
description:
Jason King is perfect. Whether it's the British accent, his flawless fashion sense or having been able to pick up life again after having been through trauma as a result from his kidnapping, everyone agrees that this man is immaculate.

However, things are never the way they appear to the eye.

While hiding his inner battles, Jason struggles to get through his daily life that's full of triggers to his Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder. As the ghost from the past is haunting him, he tries to move on and continue life as if he'd never been gone--all the while keeping up a perfect persona. Because all he's ever been is perfect, after all.

*

✩ Featured by WattPad as a Fresh Read (July 27th, 2021) ✩

#freementalillness

Be aware this book deals with post-traumatic stress disorder and might be triggering.

This story is part of #ProjectManDown, #BoysDontCry and #FreeTheBoy to show you men can feel pain too.

*

Featured on WattPad's @generalfiction
Featured on WattPad's @NA
Featured on WattPad's @ComeSitWithUs
Featured on WattPad's @bullyingprevention

Second place in WattPad's Psychological Novel Contest

What others said:

"It was refreshing to come across a book that not only provides insight on mental illness but also does so in a realistic way. I appreciated the fact that you not only focused on what it is like to have a mental illness, but also how mental illness can have a ripple effect on friends and family; and how the journey isn't always one of smooth sailing." - @CreativeBibliophile

"Wow, this was written so exceptionally well. All of my senses were completely engaged and I love how realistic your writing is." - GhostsInsideOfMyBed

"Never have [I] felt so connected to a character, honestly. His struggles feel so real, it's astonishing." - @BeZorro

*

This story is a spin-off to All The Things We Lost but can be read as a standalone.

Cover by @dysanic
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My love for stories began before I can even remember. At first, stories were being read to me before I went to bed, then I learned to read myself and would always have a book in my hands. When I was 9, I found out books were written by actual people (it was a big revelation, truly), and I wrote my first story that I submitted for a national contest, which I won too. Now, ten years later, I can officially call myself a Watty winner. My love for writing has not ceased one bit since the first time I found out about the wonderful world of writing, and I hope to be able to share many more stories over the following years on this platform.

title: My Guardian Angel (BOOK ONE)✓
description:
Anyone who has grown up in a home filled with volatility and sinister secrets or who has seen it will agree that child abuse is wrong and repulsive. In this story, a preteen undergoes the struggle of wanting to come clean about her abusive parents but being afraid of the repercussions. Will she manage to defend herself? Can she ever forget that life and move on?

                         *******************

Elora was born and raised in Michigan by her parents and her older brother, whom she considers "abusive"  and who she is unwilling to reveal to people she has a strong friendship with. She learns her parents have been keeping her adoption a secret on her twelfth birthday. With the aid of guidance, she is able to leave the violent privilege of her prior life and travel the real world to a new city where she must rely on adults to find her real parents and lead a better life. She sees the future with the assistance of her guardian angel, and she uses it to find what she's looking for. But Elora is unaware of how her life will be changed irrevocably by this journey of pursuing her own path.

description:

Adira Archibong wants to be a supermodel, but as she steps into a world of money, fame, and detrayal, she learns that the only people she can trust are her friends.
 
                                     *****
 
Adira Archibong is starting out in the Nigerian modelling industry, but quickly loses her agent when she refuses to go nude for a shoot. Then she's approached by Benjamin, a modeling executive, who brings her into his agency, but also wants to date her. Soon she and Benjamin are a couple, but as time goes on she learns more about him and the secrets he keeps. There are lies surrounding all men in Adira's life. As a model, the only people she can trust are her friends. But will they be enough to save her?

title: Finding You
description:
Two lost souls. Finding each other. Finding themselves.

Luna is a sophomore in college with a group of friends that have become family to her, and to everyone else she's got it all together. The sweet girl who isn't afraid to get a little wild. But no one knows her inner demons. Silently struggling to hold on, she meets Sebastian who shows her how to save herself.

Sebastian is the guy everyone wants to be around. Life of the party. An addictive charm. But no one knows his inner demons. Silently suffering from a past trauma, Luna helps him realize he isn't alone. 

Follow Luna and Sebastian along the journey of self discovery, self love, and maybe even finding love along the way of a dark path.

title: Marrying my Best friend
description:
The continuation for Book I Best Friends 


"What's holding you back from committing, Nicole?"

"I'm stretched so thin-work, the kids, everything. I can't give him the kind of love he needs when I'm barely keeping it together."

"You don't have to do it all, babe. I'm not asking for perfection. I just want us-not the weight of everything else."

How can you love someone more than you love yourself? You try to make everything easier for them, but sometimes, the truth is, you can't help. When their biggest battle is with themselves, it's hard to watch. I want her to get better-not for me, not for the boys-but for herself. But am I chasing something she'll never be able to give? Am I willing to let go of the idea of marriage to satisfy her, or will I push her to the edge of no return?


Xoxo,

The best friend ♥️

description:
Xenia N'Diaye is that girl, the one with the issues who majors in making the wrong decisions, especially those involving love.

So she lives by a few rules: No man, No sex, No love and one goal of becoming a good mother but even at that she is failing miserably.

The company she works for has a new team of ex-pat managers with which arrives the smart and directive Gregory Carlton. 

Xenia is a quick-mouthed extrovert, and Gregory is your modern-day workaholic.

From the first encounter, sparks fly in the opposite direction between the two. 

If things couldn't get worse, Gregory moves into the same residence as Xenia.

title: Nothing to lose
description:
My best friend Greyson McNamara and I have been partners in crime for a while now. Pranks, sneaking out to go to parties, joy riding in our parents' cars, all that crazy teen stuff, we made a pact to do together. And surprise surprise, dating each other was never on that list. I mean it's not like Grey is a bad looking guy or anything. Wink wink.

Now back to that no dating thing. For years, we heard about how we would be a cute couple and how we are perfect for each other. Of course, we always laughed it off until one day we didn't.

Our senior year has ended with two back to back breakups and all we can think is that we have nothing to lose. That includes us thinking that it can't hurt to try to date each other for the summer before college. We made a promise to each other that we'll stay friends no matter what. 

Like I said we have nothing to lose. But what if I'm wrong?

title: Fragments of Me [Book 1]
description:
Labeled "the dumb one" by teachers and dismissed by her family, she's spent her life feeling like an outsider, chasing approval and burying her dreams. When love turns into betrayal, and heartbreak leaves her shattered, she finds herself alone, staring at the pieces of her life.

Desperate for answers, she turns to a blank notebook, pouring out years of silence and pain. What begins as an experiment becomes a journey-one that forces her to confront her past, redefine her worth, and start piecing herself back together.

"Fragments of Me" is a raw, emotional story of breaking free from the labels we're given, rewriting our narrative, and learning to love ourselves.

title: A Boyfriend? How About No.
description:
"You're mine and only mine."

I swallowed hard. "Well, what if I had a teeny tiny crush on someone?" 

He slammed his hand on the table beside him, smashing his fingers through it.

His hands were now covered in splinters and fresh blood.

"That looked like it hurt. Do you want me to get the first aid kit?"

"No." He rumbled. "Who is he? Tell me who has your heart."

Lennon has been best friends with Rocky Tyler for years. Then a new guy who goes by the name Ash Sierra comes in, threatening to destroy their lifelong friendship.

title: Mind the Gap | ✔️
description:
| 𝟭𝟲𝘅 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗗 · [EDITORS' CHOICE -- NOVEMBER 2020] [ONC 2020 Winner] Two strangers on separate trains, divided by uncaring glass.
A bond forms between them.
But will it hold when their trains are bound for different destinations?

Evan's heart has been bleeding since his little family was torn apart by divorce, and his nose runs with a cold. Trying to pick up the pieces of his life, he has changed cities, and he's about to change jobs. And he has run out of tissues.

A woman's blue hair catches his eye at a train station. And her smile, fortified by braces, catches his heart.

Sitting in her train, Iris revels in her future perfect. Her work is finally getting published and she has found Mr. Right. Nothing could go wrong now.

Gazing out of the window, she sees the stranger. He looks miserable and sneezes, but her hands want to tousle his bed hair. 

A random encounter at a subway station. But both of them are caught in their tracks and when their trains pull apart, they don't expect to meet again.

⭐⭐⭐

This is a slow-burn, peculiar romance; an expanded Open Novella Contest Entry based on Prompt #61 in the Romance section:

"After being jilted, you move to the city to hide your embarrassment, lick your wounds, and start afresh."

Cover illustrations by @EvelynHail.

"Mind the Gap" is ONLY available on Wattpad. If you are reading this anywhere else, it is a plagiarized version that may contain malware.

Born in a fractured country uprooted by the Yugoslav wars, I learned to fight and read at the same time.

That wasn't enough to keep my single mum and me clothed and fed, so we sought refuge, immigrating to faraway Ireland. There I discovered my Galway Girl soul and my love for the English language.

Years later, I returned to mainland Europe and earned two PhDs in English and Latin American Lit.

These days, I work as an English Literature teacher at university, program in Python, and write books in English, German and Spanish.

'I've been through a lot of pain and dirt
And I've got the scars to prove it ♫'

I climbed the ladder from zero to hero.
I survived, adapted and endured, and this in turn gave birth to a plethora of creative stories.

Now I am a music maker and I am a dreamer of dreams.

Der Letzte Zug

description:
When Kate returns home to boarding school, she must fend off her ex-boyfriend who is now dating her sister and her childhood bully desperate to learn her newfound secrets.

An Enemies to Lovers Romance:

When Kate is forced to move back home to boarding school only to be confronted by the school's infamous bad boy and her childhood bully, she is quickly reminded of the reasons she wanted to leave so desperately in the first place- her cheating ex boyfriend being one of those reasons. 

However, Kate finds herself put in multiple precarious positions with Lachlan and faces questions about their quick changing relationship.

Tortured with past family secrets and the question of her parentage and the danger that accompanies that knowledge, Kate is in more peril than ever, and this blooming romance between her and a boy who used to make her life a living hell isn't helping with her confusion and fear.  

Can she push past the reservations she holds against Lachlan and truly let him into her heart to face the danger together, or will they be forever stained by the afterglow of the traumatic past and damage that she refused to share with anyone besides herself?

title: Risky Decisions
description:
Nico Vaughan, the junior class "Nice Girl" wants to be free from her abusive and obsessive ex-boyfriend. 

Valen Henford, the school's resident "Rich Guy meets Bad Boy" wants to spend his senior year with the girl he's been in love with for years. 

When their worlds clash, it's a battle of Risky Decisions, each one pulling them closer together. As their separate stories weave into one, they become one team working to grant each other the "more" they've both always dreamed of having.

▪️ New Chpts every Monday and Thursday ▪️
▪️ Dual Pov ▪️
▪️ Fake-Dating Trope ▪️

|◁ II ▷|

Valen walks me to Chemistry after the break, which we spent huddled in a crowded area of the hallway, earning us a lot of looks. 

I've noticed that some people I usually get waves and smiles from haven't done quite so many in the past week. My worry is growing. Am I ruining my reputation? 

Valen sees my troubled look and bumps me lightly. "Wanna hold hands?" He asks cheekily. 

A light laugh bubbles from my chest, and I lightly smack the hand he's holding out for me. He whines and rubs it dramatically. How did the rumors get this gentle man so twisted?

title: I'm All Yours
description:
Third and final addition to the 'Three Words Series'

Naomi and Theo have grown in more ways than one. They've spent years apart but still together in ways.

Naomi is now 26 years old, five years since she left uni. Five years, since she took the fashion industry by storm. She's now one of the most well known fashion creative directors in the country.

Theo is now 28 years old. He hasn't changed much since uni. Well, besides becoming a famous footballer. He made it, he had done it, he was famous and rich, living a lavish life. What else could he ask for? 

Her. That's what. He never stopped thinking about her all those years. 

Five years can do a lot to a person and a relationship.

**THIS BOOK IS MATURE**

**CANNOT BE READ AS A STAND ALONE, MUST READ 'CLOUDING MY JUDGEMENT' AND THEN 'WAITING ON YOU' FIRST.**

- - - 

I watched her intensely. I took in every detail, every single thing I could to just remember this moment. This exact moment. To have it. To breathe it. 

For it to be burned into my memory. To have it never leave me.

For me to see her like this, just once. Just for me to see her.

And let me just say, my heart wasn't pounding 

It was knocking at the door which was my ribcage 

It was crying out loud for my mouth to finally open and say something. 

It was clawing against my internal organs to draw some kind of expression on my face to showcase the pain I was experiencing. 

The feeling I was suffering through seeing her for the first time. 

For the first time after everything. After those long five years after she left my room without daring to give me a second look after I told her what I'd done.

How I betrayed her trust in a singular night.

And here I was now, watching her.

Seeing her step one foot infront of the other antagonisingly slowly. All this, just to see her 

Just to see her walking down the aisle as I watched on, silently.

- T.

- - -
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Dancing With The Masquerade
description:
Twenty-six-year-old Kasiemobi Ejindu knows something sinister has been moving on with her for as long as she could recall even though she's oblivious of its true threats but a shocking revelation regarding her ancestral background and her sudden encounter with a young Hispanic-American pastor might just be her first true direction to finding salvation and love.

* * *

It's Christmas holiday, a time of joy, relaxation, thanksgiving and being with family but not for Kasiemobi, well, at least not this year.

Twenty-six-year-old Kasiemobi Ejindu is conscious of the fact that something sinister has entwined with her life for as long as she could recall, and even though she is oblivious of the true threat it poses, she has learned to live with it. That is until a week before Christmas when her fiancée abruptly breaks off their engagement and she eventually travels to her hometown alone on major account of her young cousin's wedding. There, she meets Cergio Suarez, a young Hispanic-American pastor whose company she eventually grows fond of but their relationship-and ultimately her life is threatened by forces beyond her control and if she doesn't give into its demand, she stands a chance of losing her entire family and what they stand for.

authorBio:
I write stories with black female female protagonists which are set in the UK. I started writing because I thought that these types of stories were rare, I didn't see representation so I was happy to create some. Coming on Wattpad, I realised that there are so many black women who write these types of stories and it inspired me to keep going.

My stories are not just about being black. I like to write about romance, friendships and personal development. I strive for relatability - I like stories that seem real and mirror everyday life. You may not find absolutely crazy twists but you will definitely relate to a chapter or two.

I feel like 'XO' and and 'XOX' did this reasonably well. The protagonist, Alex, is just a normal teenager finding love for the first time. Those pieces are lighthearted, funny and positive and in the best way possible, normal.

As I mature, I want to touch on more complex, darker themes. 'The Host' and 'babygirl' are my avenues for this.

I love writing but I think I love writing for people more. Don't be shy to leave a comment or send me a message, I read them all (and I always message back to DMs) :)

-Ari

title: The Specific Ocean
description:
In 2017, seven college friends receive letters they wrote to themselves ten years ago in a writing class.

They decide to reunite in New York City after they learn their beloved professor has died. 

Over one night the members of their group reminisce about a simpler time, reignite old flames, and grapple with where they thought they'd be ten years ago as opposed to where they actually ended up.

title: GuiTara
description:
*Completed*
Becoming a big-time pop music sensation was the last thing Tara Henrie expected when she moved to Mexico City.

After getting fired for assaulting her co-worker due to a personal issue, 22-year-old Tara has to move all the way from Ghana to Mexico to work for her bossy older sister. But on Tara's first day as a waitress, things take a horrid turn for the worse when a clumsy mistake results in her immediate dismissal. Upset with everything and everyone, Tara makes the quickest decision to return home. But those plans fly out the window when she meets Shaun Perez, a dashing young man with a daring secret, who looks past all of Tara's mistakes and encourages her to share her music with the world.

Come join GuiTara on her rocky path to fame, a stronger friendship and maybe...love?

Started: 01/01/2020
Finished: 30/09/2020
Rewritten: 06/11/2022 - 16/11/2024
Word Count: 100,000 - 150,000 words
*2nd Draft*

title: Satan's Most wanted Person
description:
Satan: The supreme evil spirit or deity who tempts humanity and rules hell 

Most wanted: Someone subject to detainment by authorities in sight.

This is a novel of a young lady's journey to fulfill her God-given destiny in her life and her encounter with the devil disguised as human. 

She has become his MOST WANTED PERSON and she would be his most priced target why, because a Superior being has intricately woven His divinity around her... 

He now has a mission to accomplish. All odds have been laid on the table.


....

Excerpt

"Well, don't think the devil is going to leave you alone just because you claim to be a child of God," he said with a smirk...

"I am not claiming, I know that very well Claunt Luc and I also know my God will never leave me alone just because I am His child," I retorted with a smile and a tone of sincerity lace in my voice.

title: When The Sun Sets In The East
description:
A thirty-seven-year-old woman who never breaks the rules finds herself facing unexpected consequences after a one night stand with a younger man.

                             * * *

☆ FEATURED ON @WattpadStars reading list (stars did NaNo), @Romance (Romance spotlight: Featured stories), @AmbassadorsNG reading list, @Wattpad reading lists (escape through stories) (strong female leads), @WattpadExplorer reading lists (#CelebrateBlackStories), (Black girl magic) (April, Editor's pick) and @ContemporaryLit reading lists (Hot picks) (contemporary romance) (celebrate women's history month)☆

Genevieve Ukaji is a successful banker still single at thirty-seven-years-old. Her mother continues to remind her to find a husband. Her colleagues gossip about her behind her back, and to make matters worse, she wakes up one morning in a stranger's bed.

Regardless, she decided to push the experience to the back of her mind until the stranger unexpectedly walks into her parents' home, and she realises the big age difference between them.

Genevieve is too ashamed and embarrassed of herself. She wants nothing to do with him, but it's not the same for the cute stranger. He tries his hardest to bring her out of her shell.

Amidst all this, Genevieve finds out she's expecting. For the first time in her life, she would have to decide if this glimmer of happiness is enough to face the fear of what others might say about her.
 

THIS WAS A NaNoWriMo2020 PROJECT.

THIS BOOK IS COMPLETE

Started: 06/11/20
Completed: 29/11/20

Edited with the help of @SabaUmmeSalma

title: The Author and Her Bodyguard
description:
Highest rank #14 LOVE---
Twenty-two-year-old Laliana Summers can hardly believe it when she becomes a famous author.  But the dream slowly becomes a nightmare when a mysterious stalker breaks into her home. This person knows everything about her, and soon being in the spotlight becomes Laliana's own personal hell, with nowhere to hide. 
---
Forced into a decision that leaves her with no privacy, Laliana is stuck with a bodyguard to watch over her until the stalker is found. And this particular, breathtakingly handsome bodyguard is proving to be a terrible distraction for her ability to focus on writing.

title: Through the motions
description:
Willow isn't the outgoing type; she usually keeps to herself, especially now that she's moved to a new city where everything feels unfamiliar. The bustling streets and vibrant social scenes only deepen her sense of isolation, as she navigates her days with a quiet shyness that has always been her companion. However, everything begins to shift when she unexpectedly meets Menace, a charismatic and adventurous spirit who seems to thrive in the chaos around them. His magnetic personality draws her in, challenging her comfort zone and igniting a spark of curiosity within her that she never knew existed. As they explore the city together, the walls she built around herself start to crumble, leaving Willow wondering if this connection might just be the key to transforming her solitary existence into one filled with possibilities and vibrant experiences.

*I don't own any songs or pictures in this book.

Who had any idea she would have to crawl out of her online home for once?

title: Unspoken Melodies: Poems That Sing
description:
"Unspoken Melodies" is a poignant collection of poems that traverses the depths of human emotion, unveiling the unexpressed desires, dreams, and sorrows that often remain hidden within the heart. Through lyrical verses and evocative imagery, this book invites readers to explore the inner landscapes of the soul, where love, loss, hope, and resilience interweave to create a symphony of emotions. Each poem is a delicate thread in the tapestry of life's experiences, resonating with the universal and the personal. From the quiet whispers of unrequited love to the triumphant echoes of self-discovery, these verses touch upon the unspoken, the unsung, and the uncharted territories of the heart. "Unspoken Melodies" is a poetic journey that invites readers to listen closely to the emotions that often go unnoticed, transforming them into unforgettable verses that linger in the mind long after the last page is turned.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=NVLSDH2QPXRRN                                                                       I am Jefferson, a passionate writer driven by the power of words and storytelling. It is through my writing that I strive to create worlds, evoke emotions, and inspire minds.

I have always been captivated by the written word, finding solace and adventure within the pages of books from a young age. As I ventured into the realm of literary creation, I discovered the joy of crafting my own narratives, breathing life into characters, and exploring the depths of imagination.

Writing allows me to channel my thoughts, ideas, and experiences into a tangible form. It is a way for me to express my perspectives, shed light on various subjects, and spark meaningful discussions. Through my words, I aim to entertain, provoke thoughts, and leave a lasting impact on the hearts and minds of readers.

Every piece I write is a reflection of my unique voice and perspective. I am drawn to various genres and styles, constantly seeking new ways to challenge my creativity and expand my horizons. While writing is often a solitary endeavor, I find immense joy in connecting with readers. Your feedback, comments, and interactions bring my words to life in ways that I could never have anticipated. It is a true privilege to be a part of your reading journey, and I am grateful for the opportunity to share my stories with you.

I believe in the power of storytelling to bridge gaps, foster empathy, and ignite change. Through my writing, I aspire to transport you to new worlds, challenge your perspectives, and ignite your imagination. I want my words to resonate with you, to evoke emotions, and to leave you with a feeling of connection and understanding.

Thank you for joining me on this literary adventure. I invite you to explore the realms I have created, to dive into the stories I have crafted, and to join me in celebrating the magic of the written word.

title: Love Graduate (Completed) Season 2 In Ben and Am's Romance
description:
At twenty-seven, YouTube sensation Ben Leonards is married to his work. If he's not whipping up lasagna with a side of science experiments, he's running statistical analysis of bitcoin during explosive behavior periods.

When a friend asks him to organize a baby shower, he's quick to jump on board, however, there's a catch. His co-host is Amelie D'Amico, the girl who moved to France and left him holding the pieces of his heart. Ben has never stopped loving her, but knowing and saying it are two different things.

In the past, Amelie has put her career above her heart, but after adding a PhD to her name and landing her dream job at a top-notch university in Chicago, a string of mishaps are not enough to distract her from the whirlwind of emotions she still holds for Ben.

Both are too stubborn to make the first move.

Both are convinced it will never last.

Yet, wild combinations can make for the most delicious recipes.

THE GIRL HE USED TO KNOW x NORMAL PEOPLE  - a contemporary second-chance romance.

This is a Ben and Am story five years after they first met. If you'd like to read what happened between them 5 years ago, please read Love Novice.

title: BETROTHED
description:
In a world where love is both sought-after and elusive, two souls find themselves entangled in the intricate web of fate. 

She, a woman with a heart full of love to give, yearns for companionship and connection. Yet, destiny seems determined to test her resolve, throwing obstacles in her path at every turn.

He, on the other hand, carries the weight of a turbulent past and a fractured soul. Each day feels like a battle against the cruelty of fate as he struggles to find comfort in a world that has shown him little kindness.

Despite their differences, their paths cross in a twist of fate that neither could have predicted. As they navigate the complexities of life and love, they are forced to confront their vulnerabilities and insecurities, finding strength in each other's presence.

In a tale woven with the threads of destiny, fate, and faith, The Quran serves as a guiding light, reminding them to trust in the wisdom of Allah's divine plan, even in the face of uncertainty.

───────────────

"You can't escape fate-especially when it brings you to the one you love."

title: Gunpoint Avenue
description:
One of the best spies in the United States suffers Post Traumatic Stress breakdowns and almost dying on the job. She goes back to her hometown to spend winter break with her family members and to take care of her mental health. Things are going well until a group of strangers starts stalking and terrorizing her family and the neighborhood. Which causes her PTSD and anxiety to worsen. There's a major reason why these random strangers are terrorizing her family and everyone around them. But after the strangers go too far, she finds a way to deal with her PTSD and get her revenge.

Book cover made by Jkaloko, myself!
